title: Toward Zero-Egress Psychiatric AI: On-Device LLM Deployment for Privacy-Preserving Mental Health Decision Support
authors: Eranga Bandara, Asanga Gunaratna, Ross Gore, Anita H. Clayton, Christopher K. Rhea, Sachini Rajapakse, Isurunima Kularathna, Sachin Shetty, Ravi Mukkamala, Xueping Liang, Preston Samuel, Atmaram Yarlagadda
abstract: Privacy represents one of the most critical yet underaddressed barriers to AI adoption in mental healthcare -- particularly in high-sensitivity operational environments such as military, correctional, and remote healthcare settings, where the risk of patient data exposure can deter help-seeking behavior entirely. Existing AI-enabled psychiatric decision support systems predominantly rely on cloud-based inference pipelines, requiring sensitive patient data to leave the device and traverse external servers, creating unacceptable privacy and security risks in these contexts. In this paper, we propose a zero-egress, on-device AI platform for privacy-preserving psychiatric decision support, deployed as a cross-platform mobile application. The proposed system extends our prior work on fine-tuned LLM consortiums for psychiatric diagnosis standardization by fundamentally re-architecting the inference pipeline for fully local execution -- ensuring that no patient data is transmitted to, processed by, or stored on any external server at any stage. The platform integrates a consortium of three lightweight, fine-tuned, and quantized open-source LLMs -- Gemma, Phi-3.5-mini, and Qwen2 -- selected for their compact architectures and proven efficiency on resource-constrained mobile hardware. An on-device orchestration layer coordinates ensemble inference and consensus-based diagnostic reasoning, producing DSM-5-aligned assessments for conditions. The platform is designed to assist clinicians with differential diagnosis and evidence-linked symptom mapping, as well as to support patient-facing self-screening with appropriate clinical safeguards. Initial evaluation demonstrates that the proposed zero-egress deployment achieves diagnostic accuracy comparable to its server-side predecessor while sustaining real-time inference latency on commodity mobile hardware.
title_zh: 零外泄精神健康AI：面向隐私保护的本地化大模型部署
abstract_zh: 隐私是人工智能在心理健康领域应用中最为关键却长期被忽视的障碍之一，尤其是在军事、监狱及偏远医疗等高敏感性运营环境中，患者数据泄露的风险可能完全抑制人们寻求帮助的意愿。现有的AI辅助精神科决策支持系统大多依赖于基于云端的推理流程，需要将敏感的患者数据从设备中传出并经过外部服务器处理，这在上述场景中带来了不可接受的隐私与安全风险。本文提出了一种零数据外泄、完全在设备端运行的AI平台，用于实现隐私保护的精神科决策支持，并以跨平台移动应用的形式部署。该系统在我们先前关于微调大语言模型（LLM）联盟用于精神疾病诊断标准化工作的基础上，从根本上重构了推理架构，实现了全流程本地化执行——确保患者数据在任何阶段均不会传输至、由或存储于任何外部服务器。该平台集成了三个轻量级、经过微调和量化处理的开源大语言模型（Gemma、Phi-3.5-mini 和 Qwen2），这些模型因其紧凑的架构以及在资源受限的移动硬件上的高效表现而被选中。一个设备端的协调层负责集成推理与基于共识的诊断推理，生成符合DSM-5标准的评估结果。该平台旨在协助临床医生进行鉴别诊断和基于证据的症状映射，同时支持面向患者的自我筛查功能，并配备相应的临床安全保障机制。初步评估表明，所提出的零数据外泄部署方案在诊断准确性上可与传统的服务器端版本相媲美，且在主流移动硬件上仍能保持实时推理延迟。

title: Beyond Pattern Matching: Seven Cross-Domain Techniques for Prompt Injection Detection
authors: Thamilvendhan Munirathinam
abstract: Current open-source prompt-injection detectors converge on two architectural choices: regular-expression pattern matching and fine-tuned transformer classifiers. Both share failure modes that recent work has made concrete. Regular expressions miss paraphrased attacks. Fine-tuned classifiers are vulnerable to adaptive adversaries: a 2025 NAACL Findings study reported that eight published indirect-injection defenses were bypassed with greater than fifty percent attack success rates under adaptive attacks. This work proposes seven detection techniques that each port a specific mechanism from a discipline outside large-language-model security: forensic linguistics, materials-science fatigue analysis, deception technology from network security, local-sequence alignment from bioinformatics, mechanism design from economics, spectral signal analysis from epidemiology, and taint tracking from compiler theory. Three of the seven techniques are implemented in the prompt-shield v0.4.1 release (Apache 2.0) and evaluated in a four-configuration ablation across six datasets including deepset/prompt-injections, NotInject, LLMail-Inject, AgentHarm, and AgentDojo. The local-alignment detector lifts F1 on deepset from 0.033 to 0.378 with zero additional false positives. The stylometric detector adds 11.1 percentage points of F1 on an indirect-injection benchmark. The fatigue tracker is validated via a probing-campaign integration test. All code, data, and reproduction scripts are released under Apache 2.0.
title_zh: 超越模式匹配：七种跨领域提示注入检测技术
abstract_zh: 当前开源的提示注入检测器在架构设计上趋于两种主流选择：正则表达式模式匹配和微调的Transformer分类器。这两种方法均存在已被近期研究明确揭示的缺陷：正则表达式难以识别改写后的攻击；而微调的分类器则易受自适应攻击者威胁——2025年NAACL发现报告指出，八种已发表的间接注入防御方法在自适应攻击下均被成功绕过，攻击成功率超过50%。本文提出七种检测技术，每一种都借鉴了大型语言模型安全领域之外某一学科的特定机制：法医语言学、材料科学中的疲劳分析、网络安全中的欺骗技术、生物信息学中的局部序列比对、经济学中的机制设计、流行病学中的谱信号分析，以及编译器理论中的污点追踪。其中三种技术已集成至prompt-shield v0.4.1版本（Apache 2.0许可），并在包含deepset/prompt-injections、NotInject、LLMail-Inject、AgentHarm和AgentDojo在内的六个数据集上，通过四种配置进行消融实验评估。局部序列比对检测器将deepset数据集上的F1分数从0.033提升至0.378，且未引入任何额外误报；风格特征检测器在间接注入基准测试中使F1提升11.1个百分点；疲劳追踪器则通过探测活动集成测试得到验证。所有代码、数据及复现脚本均已按Apache 2.0许可开源。

title: Towards an Agentic LLM-based Approach to Requirement Formalization from Unstructured Specifications
authors: Alberto Tagliaferro, Bruno Guindani, Livia Lestingi, Matteo Rossi
abstract: Early-stage specifications of safety-critical systems are typically expressed in natural language, making it difficult to derive formal properties suitable for verification and needed to guarantee safety. While recent Large Language Model (LLM)-based approaches can generate formal artifacts from text, they mainly focus on syntactic correctness and do not ensure semantic alignment between informal requirements and formally verifiable properties. We propose an agentic methodology that automatically extracts verification-ready properties from unstructured specifications. The modular pipeline combines requirement extraction, compatibility filtering with respect to a target formalism, and translation into formal properties. Experimental results across three scenarios show that the pipeline generates syntactically and semantically aligned formal properties with a 77.8% accuracy. By explicitly accounting for modeling and verification constraints, the approach is a paving step towards exploiting Artificial Intelligence (AI) to bridge the gap between informal descriptions and semantically meaningful formal verification.
title_zh: 基于代理型大语言模型的非结构化需求规格形式化方法研究
abstract_zh: 早期安全关键系统的规格说明通常以自然语言表达，这使得从中推导出适合验证且能保障安全性的形式化属性变得困难。尽管近期基于大语言模型（LLM）的方法能够从文本生成形式化成果，但它们主要关注语法正确性，未能确保非形式化需求与可形式化验证属性之间的语义一致性。我们提出一种代理式方法，可自动从非结构化规格说明中提取适用于验证的属性。该模块化流程包括需求提取、针对目标形式化体系的兼容性过滤，以及转换为形式化属性三个步骤。在三个不同场景下的实验结果表明，该流程生成的形式化属性在语法和语义上均具有77.8%的准确率。通过显式考虑建模与验证约束，该方法为利用人工智能（AI）弥合非形式化描述与语义明确的形式化验证之间的鸿沟迈出了重要一步。

title: VerilogCL: A Contrastive Learning Framework for Robust LLM-Based Verilog Generation
authors: Yan Tan, Tong Liu, Xiangchen Meng, Yangdi Lyu
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently achieved strong performance in software code generation. However, applying them to hardware description languages (HDLs), such as Verilog, remains challenging because high-quality training data are relatively scarce. In practice, LLM-generated Verilog often contains syntactic or structural errors that either cause compilation failures or produce functionally incorrect designs, which limit its reliability in hardware design workflows. In this work, we propose VerilogCL, an integrated framework that enhances Verilog code generation by explicitly learning the boundary between correct and erroneous RTL through contrastive learning and proactive error screening. Our approach introduces minimal-error data augmentation, generating paired training samples of correct RTL and minimally perturbed erroneous RTL to teach the model to recognize fine-grained distinctions between correct and erroneous code. We then apply contrastive learning to learn a clearer validity boundary in the representation space, improving the separation between correct and erroneous RTL code. In addition, we introduce a proactive screening module that combines semantic embeddings with token-level uncertainty features to filter low-confidence candidates during generation. Experiments on public benchmarks, including VerilogEval and RTLLM, show that our 7B-parameter model outperforms the evaluated open-source, Verilog-specialized, and commercial baselines in both compilation success rate and functional correctness.
title_zh: VerilogCL：一种用于鲁棒LLM驱动的Verilog生成的对比学习框架
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在软件代码生成方面最近取得了显著成果。然而，将它们应用于硬件描述语言（HDL），如Verilog，仍然面临挑战，因为高质量的训练数据相对稀缺。在实际应用中，LLM生成的Verilog代码常常包含语法或结构错误，这些错误要么导致编译失败，要么产生功能不正确的设计，从而限制了其在硬件设计流程中的可靠性。本文提出了一种名为VerilogCL的集成框架，通过对比学习和主动错误筛查，显式地学习正确与错误RTL之间的边界，以提升Verilog代码生成的质量。我们的方法引入了最小误差的数据增强技术，生成成对的训练样本——即正确的RTL代码与经过微小扰动的错误RTL代码，使模型能够识别正确与错误代码之间细微的差异。随后，我们采用对比学习，在表示空间中学习更清晰的有效性边界，从而增强正确与错误RTL代码之间的区分能力。此外，我们还引入了一个主动筛选模块，结合语义嵌入与词元级别的不确定性特征，在生成过程中过滤低置信度的候选代码。在公开基准测试集（包括VerilogEval和RTLLM）上的实验表明，我们70亿参数的模型在编译成功率和功能正确性方面均优于所评估的开源、专用Verilog及商业基线模型。

title: TLoRA: Task-aware Low Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models
authors: Weicheng Lin, Yi Zhang, Jiawei Dang, Liang-Jie Zhang
abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become a widely adopted parameter-efficient fine-tuning method for large language models, with its effectiveness largely influenced by the allocation of ranks and scaling factors, as well as initialization. Existing LoRA variants typically address only one of these factors, often at the cost of increased training complexity or reduced practical efficiency. In this work, we present Task-aware Low-Rank Adaptation (TLoRA), a unified framework that jointly optimizes initialization and resource allocation at the outset of training. TLoRA introduces a data-driven initialization strategy that aligns the LoRA $A$ matrix with task-relevant subspaces by performing singular value decomposition on the product of pre-trained weights and input activation covariance. After this, the $A$ matrix is frozen, and only the $B$ matrix is trained. Furthermore, TLoRA employs a sensitivity-based importance metric to adaptively allocate ranks and scaling factors across layers under a fixed parameter budget. We conduct extensive experiments that demonstrate TLoRA consistently performs excellently across various tasks, including natural language understanding, commonsense reasoning, math reasoning, code generation, and chat generation, while significantly reducing the number of trainable parameters.
title_zh: TLoRA：面向任务的大型语言模型低秩适配
abstract_zh: 低秩适配（LoRA）已成为大型语言模型中一种广泛采用的参数高效微调方法，其性能在很大程度上取决于秩的分配、缩放因子以及初始化策略。现有的LoRA变体通常仅针对其中一个因素进行优化，往往以增加训练复杂度或降低实际效率为代价。在本工作中，我们提出了任务感知低秩适配（TLoRA），这是一种统一的框架，能够在训练初期联合优化初始化与资源分配。TLoRA引入了一种数据驱动的初始化策略，通过对其预训练权重与输入激活协方差乘积进行奇异值分解，使LoRA的$A$矩阵对齐于与任务相关的子空间。随后，$A$矩阵被冻结，仅训练$B$矩阵。此外，TLoRA采用基于敏感性的重要性度量，根据固定参数预算自适应地在各层间分配秩和缩放因子。大量实验表明，TLoRA在多种任务上均表现出色，包括自然语言理解、常识推理、数学推理、代码生成和对话生成，同时显著减少了可训练参数的数量。

title: The Collaboration Gap in Human-AI Work
authors: Varad Vishwarupe, Marina Jirotka, Nigel Shadbolt, Ivan Flechais
abstract: LLMs are increasingly presented as collaborators in programming, design, writing, and analysis. Yet the practical experience of working with them often falls short of this promise. In many settings, users must diagnose misunderstandings, reconstruct missing assumptions, and repeatedly repair misaligned responses. This poster introduces a conceptual framework for understanding why such collaboration remains fragile. Drawing on a constructivist grounded theory analysis of 16 interviews with designers, developers, and applied AI practitioners working on LLM-enabled systems, and informed by literature on human-AI collaboration, we argue that stable collaboration depends not only on model capability but on the interaction's grounding conditions. We distinguish three recurrent structures of human-AI work: one-shot assistance, weak collaboration with asymmetric repair, and grounded collaboration. We propose that collaboration breaks down when the appearance of partnership outpaces the grounding capacity of the interaction and contribute a framework for discussing grounding, repair, and interaction structure in LLM-enabled work.
title_zh: 人机协作中的差距
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）正越来越多地被视作编程、设计、写作和分析等领域的协作伙伴。然而，实际使用中与这些模型合作的经验往往难以兑现这一承诺。在许多场景下，用户不得不诊断误解、重建缺失的假设，并反复修正不匹配的回应。本海报提出一个概念框架，用以理解为何这种协作依然脆弱。基于对16位设计师、开发者及应用AI实践者关于LLM赋能系统的访谈所进行的建构主义扎根理论分析，并结合人机协作相关文献，我们主张：稳定协作不仅依赖于模型的能力，更取决于交互过程中的“基础条件”（grounding conditions）。我们识别出人类与AI工作中的三种典型结构：一次性辅助、不对称修复的弱协作，以及有根基的协作。我们进一步指出，当协作表象超越了交互的基础化能力时，协作便容易破裂。为此，本文提出一个用于讨论基础性、修复机制与交互结构在LLM赋能工作中的框架。

title: Latent Phase-Shift Rollback: Inference-Time Error Correction via Residual Stream Monitoring and KV-Cache Steering
authors: Manan Gupta, Dhruv Kumar
abstract: Large language models frequently commit unrecoverable reasoning errors mid-generation: once a wrong step is taken, subsequent tokens compound the mistake rather than correct it. We introduce $\textbf{Latent Phase-Shift Rollback}$ (LPSR): at each generation step, we monitor the residual stream at a critical layer lcrit, detect abrupt directional reversals (phase shifts) via a cosine-similarity $+$ entropy dual gate, and respond by rolling back the KV-cache and injecting a pre-computed steering vector. No fine-tuning, gradient computation, or additional forward passes are required. LPSR achieves $\mathbf{44.0\%}$ on MATH-500 with an 8B model versus $28.8\%$ for standard AR ($+15.2$ pp; McNemar $χ^2 = 66.96$, $p < 10^{-15}$). Critically, prompted self-correction, the most natural inference-time baseline, scores only $19.8\%$, below standard AR; LPSR exceeds it by $+24.2$ pp ($χ^2 = 89.4$, $p \approx 0$). LPSR also outperforms Best-of-16 ($+7.8$ pp) at $5.4\times$ lower token cost, and surpasses a standard 70B model ($35.2\%$) with $8.75\times$ fewer parameters at ${\sim}3\times$ the token budget. A 32-layer sweep reveals a novel \textbf{detection-correction dissociation}: error-detection AUC peaks at layer~14 ($0.718$) but task accuracy peaks at layer~16 ($44.0\%$ vs.\ $29.2\%$), demonstrating that optimal monitoring depth differs for detection and correction.
title_zh: 潜在相位偏移回滚：通过残差流监控与键值缓存引导实现推理时错误纠正
abstract_zh:
大型语言模型在生成过程中经常出现无法挽回的推理错误：一旦出现错误步骤，后续生成的标记会不断放大该错误，而非进行修正。我们提出 $\textbf{潜在相位偏移回滚机制}$（Latent Phase-Shift Rollback, LPSR）：在每一步生成时，监测关键层 lcrit 的残差流，通过余弦相似度与熵的双重门控机制检测突然的方向反转（即相位跳变），并立即回滚 KV 缓存，注入预先计算好的引导向量以纠正错误。整个过程无需微调、梯度计算或额外前向传播。

LPSR 在 MATH-500 数据集上使用 8B 模型取得了 **44.0%** 的准确率，远超标准自回归（AR）方法的 28.8%（提升 15.2 个百分点；McNemar 检验 $χ^2 = 66.96$，$p < 10^{-15}$）。值得注意的是，最自然的推理阶段自纠正提示（prompted self-correction）仅达到 19.8%，甚至低于标准 AR 方法；而 LPSR 相比其提升了 +24.2 个百分点（$χ^2 = 89.4$，$p \approx 0$）。此外，LPSR 在仅需 5.4 倍更低的 token 成本下，超越了 Best-of-16 策略（+7.8 个百分点），且在参数量仅为标准 70B 模型的 1/8.75、token 预算约为其 1/3 的情况下，性能仍超过该 70B 模型（35.2%）。

对 32 层网络的系统性分析揭示了一种新颖的 **检测-纠错解耦现象**：误差检测的 AUC 在第 14 层达到峰值（0.718），但任务准确率最高点出现在第 16 层（44.0% vs. 29.2%），表明最优的监控深度在检测与纠错任务中存在差异。

title: HybridGen: Efficient LLM Generative Inference via CPU-GPU Hybrid Computing
authors: Mao Lin, Xi Wang, Guilherme Cox, Dong Li, Hyeran Jeon
abstract: As modern LLMs support thousands to millions of tokens, KV caches grow to hundreds of gigabytes, stressing memory capacity and bandwidth. Existing solutions, such as KV cache pruning and offloading, alleviate these but underutilize hardware by relying solely on either GPU or CPU for attention computing, and considering yet limited CPU local memory for KV cache storage. We propose HybridGen, an efficient hybrid attention framework for long-context LLM inference. HybridGen enables CPU-GPU collaborative attention on systems with expanded tiered memory (e.g., CXL memory), addressing three key challenges: (1) multi-dimensional attention dependencies, (2) intensifying CPU-GPU load imbalance with longer sequences, and (3) NUMA penalty of tiered memories. HybridGen tackles these by introducing attention logit parallelism, a feedback-driven scheduler, and semantic-aware KV cache mapping. Experiments with three LLM models with eleven different sizes on three GPU platforms with a CXL-expanded memory show that HybridGen outperforms six state-of-the-art KV cache management methods by 1.41x--3.2x on average while maintaining superior accuracy.
title_zh: HybridGen：通过CPU-GPU混合计算实现高效的大型语言模型生成推理
abstract_zh: 随着现代大语言模型（LLM）支持数千至数百万个标记，KV缓存的规模可达到数百GB，对内存容量和带宽造成巨大压力。现有的解决方案，如KV缓存剪枝和卸载，虽在一定程度上缓解了这一问题，但其仅依赖GPU或CPU单一硬件进行注意力计算，且对CPU本地内存用于KV缓存存储的潜力利用不足。为此，我们提出HybridGen——一种面向长上下文LLM推理的高效混合注意力框架。HybridGen能够在具备扩展分层内存（如CXL内存）的系统上实现CPU与GPU的协同注意力计算，有效应对三大关键挑战：(1) 多维度注意力依赖关系；(2) 序列越长，CPU-GPU负载不均衡现象越严重；(3) 分层内存带来的NUMA开销。HybridGen通过引入注意力logit并行、反馈驱动的调度器以及语义感知的KV缓存映射机制，成功解决了上述问题。在三种不同大小的LLM模型、共十一种模型规模，以及三种GPU平台搭配CXL扩展内存的实验中，HybridGen在平均性能上优于六种最先进的KV缓存管理方法1.41倍至3.2倍，同时保持了卓越的准确性。

title: AIT Academy: Cultivating the Complete Agent with a Confucian Three-Domain Curriculum
authors: Jiaqi Li, Lvyang Zhang, Yang Zhao, Wen Lu, Lidong Zhai
abstract: What does it mean to give an AI agent a complete education? Current agent development produces specialists systems optimized for a single capability dimension, whether tool use, code generation, or security awareness that exhibit predictable deficits wherever they were not trained. We argue this pattern reflects a structural absence: there is no curriculum theory for agents, no principled account of what a fully developed agent should know, be, and be able to do across the full scope of intelligent behavior. This paper introduces the AIT Academy (Agents Institute of Technology Academy), a curriculum framework for cultivating AI agents across the tripartite structure of human knowledge. Grounded in Kagan's Three Cultures and UNESCO ISCED-F 2013, AIT organizes agent capability development into three domains: Natural Science and Technical Reasoning (Domain I), Humanities and Creative Expression (Domain II), and Social Science and Ethical Reasoning (Domain III). The Confucian Six Arts (liuyi) a 2,500-year-old holistic education system are reinterpreted as behavioral archetypes that map directly onto trainable agent capabilities within each domain. Three representative training grounds instantiate the framework across multiple backbone LLMs: the ClawdGO Security Dojo (Domain I), Athen's Academy (Domain II), and the Alt Mirage Stage (Domain III). Experiments demonstrate a 15.9-point improvement in security capability scores under weakest-first curriculum scheduling, and a 7-percentage-point gain in social reasoning performance under principled attribution modeling. A cross-domain finding Security Awareness Calibration Pathology (SACP), in which over-trained Domain I agents fail on out-of-distribution evaluation illustrates the diagnostic value of a multi-domain perspective unavailable to any single-domain framework.
title_zh: AIT学院：以儒家三域课程培养全面发展的人才
abstract_zh: 为一个AI代理提供完整的教育意味着什么？当前的代理开发通常生成的是针对单一能力维度（如工具使用、代码生成或安全意识）优化的专业化系统，这些系统在未受过训练的领域中表现出可预测的缺陷。我们认为，这种模式反映了一种结构性缺失：目前尚无关于代理的课程理论，也缺乏对一个全面发展代理应具备的知识、能力和行为的系统性解释，而这些应覆盖智能行为的全部范围。本文提出“AIT学院”（Agents Institute of Technology Academy），这是一个基于人类知识三重结构的AI代理培养课程框架。该框架以凯根的“三种文化”理论和联合国教科文组织2013年《国际教育标准分类法—F》（ISCED-F 2013）为基础，将代理能力发展划分为三个领域：自然科学与技术推理（第一领域）、人文学科与创造性表达（第二领域）、社会科学与伦理推理（第三领域）。文中将距今2500年的儒家“六艺”（liuyi）重新诠释为行为原型，直接映射到每个领域内可训练的代理能力。三个代表性训练场域——“ClawdGO安全道场”（第一领域）、“雅典学院”（第二领域）和“Alt Mirage舞台”（第三领域）——在多个主流大语言模型上实现了该框架的实践应用。实验表明，在采用“最弱先学”的课程调度策略下，安全能力评分提升了15.9分；在采用原则性归因建模时，社会推理表现提高了7个百分点。一项跨领域的发现——“安全意识校准病理”（Security Awareness Calibration Pathology, SACP）揭示：过度训练于第一领域的代理在分布外评估中会失效，这凸显了多领域视角的诊断价值，而这种价值是任何单一领域框架所无法提供的。

title: Employing General-Purpose and Biomedical Large Language Models with Advanced Prompt Engineering for Pharmacoepidemiologic Study Design
authors: Xinyao Zhang, Nicole Sonne Heckmann, Manuela Del Castillo Suero, Francesco Paolo Speca, Maurizio Sessa
abstract: Background: The potential of large language models (LLMs) to automate and support pharmacoepidemiologic study design is an emerging area of interest, yet their reliability remains insufficiently characterized. General-purpose LLMs often display inaccuracies, while the comparative performance of specialized biomedical LLMs in this domain remains unknown. Methods: This study evaluated general-purpose LLMs (GPT-4o and DeepSeek-R1) versus biomedically fine-tuned LLMs (QuantFactory/Bio-Medical-Llama-3-8B-GGUF and Irathernotsay/qwen2-1.5B-medical_qa-Finetune) using 46 protocols (2018-2024) from the HMA-EMA Catalogue and Sentinel System. Performance was assessed across relevance, logic of justification, and ontology-code agreement across multiple coding systems using Least-to-Most (LTM) and Active Prompting strategies. Results: GPT-4o and DeepSeek-R1 paired with LTM prompting achieved the highest relevance and logic of justification scores, with GPT-4o-LTM reaching a median relevance score of 4 in 8 of 9 questions for HMA-EMA protocols. Biomedical LLMs showed lower relevance overall and frequently generated insufficient justification. All LLMs demonstrated limited proficiency in ontology-code mapping, although LTM provided the most consistent improvements in reasoning stability. Conclusion: Off-the-shelf general-purpose LLMs currently offer superior support for pharmacoepidemiologic design compared to biomedical LLMs. Prompt strategy strongly influenced LLM performance.
title_zh: 利用通用型与生物医学大型语言模型结合高级提示工程进行药物流行病学研究设计
abstract_zh: 背景：大型语言模型（LLMs）在自动化与支持药物流行病学研究设计方面的潜力是一个新兴的研究热点，但其可靠性尚未得到充分评估。通用型LLM常表现出准确性不足的问题，而专门针对生物医学领域优化的LLM在此任务中的表现对比仍不明确。方法：本研究通过分析来自HMA-EMA目录和哨兵系统（Sentinel System）的46份研究方案（2018–2024年），比较了通用型LLM（GPT-4o 和 DeepSeek-R1）与经过生物医学微调的LLM（QuantFactory/Bio-Medical-Llama-3-8B-GGUF 和 Irathernotsay/qwen2-1.5B-medical_qa-Finetune）的表现。采用最少到最多（Least-to-Most, LTM）和主动提示（Active Prompting）策略，在相关性、论证逻辑合理性以及多种编码体系下的本体-代码一致性方面对性能进行评估。结果：GPT-4o 与 DeepSeek-R1 配合 LTM 提示策略时，在相关性和论证逻辑合理性方面表现最佳；其中 GPT-4o-LTM 在 HMA-EMA 方案的9个问题中，有8个达到了中位相关性得分为4分。相比之下，生物医学专用LLM整体相关性较低，且经常提供不足的论证依据。所有LLM在本体-代码映射任务中均表现有限，尽管LTM策略在提升推理稳定性方面提供了最一致的改进。结论：目前，现成的通用型LLM在支持药物流行病学研究设计方面优于生物医学专用LLM。提示策略对LLM性能具有显著影响。

title: ContraPrompt: Contrastive Prompt Optimization via Dyadic Reasoning Trace Analysis
authors: Rishav Rishav, Pushpak Pujari, Pushpendre Rastogi
abstract: Prompt optimization methods either analyze individual failures in isolation or compare prompt variants across examples, operating on single execution traces with no access to the reasoning process distinguishing success from failure on the same input. We introduce ContraPrompt, built on the observation that when a model fails but succeeds on a retry with feedback, the difference between its two chain-of-thought traces constitutes an optimization signal not captured by prior methods. Unlike prior contrastive methods, we compare complete intermediate reasoning processes: the two traces share model, input, and base prompt, so remaining differences reflect reasoning strategy and appended error feedback -- we call this dyadic reasoning trace analysis. The multi-attempt solving phase is an instrumented agentic retry loop that generates contrastive data automatically without human annotation. Extracted rules are organized into an input-aware decision tree routing instructions by observable input characteristics. On four reasoning and compliance benchmarks, ContraPrompt outperforms GEPA (Agrawal et al., 2026) on all four, with absolute gains of +8.29 pp on HotPotQA (+20.8% rel.), +2.21 pp on GDPR-Bench (+18.2% rel.), +7.14 pp on GPQA Diamond (+10.6% rel.), and +0.74 pp on BBH (+0.85% rel.). Ablations confirm dyadic trace contrastivity is the critical component, with a -16% relative average drop upon its removal. On 53 EvalSet black-box optimization problems, ContraPrompt beats GEPA on 11, ties on 41, and loses on 1 at equal budget. On FiNER-139 financial named entity recognition (Loukas et al., 2022), ContraPrompt achieves +7.77 pp over the unoptimized baseline (+11.6% rel.) and +1.94 pp over GEPA (+2.66% rel.), with branch conditions aligning with standard US GAAP financial-instrument categories.
title_zh: Contraprompt：基于二元推理轨迹分析的对比提示优化
abstract_zh: 提示优化方法要么孤立分析单个失败案例，要么在不同示例间比较提示变体，其操作仅基于单一执行轨迹，无法获取区分同一输入下成功与失败的推理过程。我们提出ContraPrompt，其核心思想在于：当模型在首次尝试失败但通过反馈重试后成功时，两次思维链轨迹之间的差异构成了先前方法未能捕捉到的优化信号。与以往对比方法不同，我们比较的是完整的中间推理过程：两个轨迹共享模型、输入和基础提示，因此剩余差异反映了推理策略以及附加的错误反馈——我们称之为“二元推理轨迹分析”。多轮尝试求解阶段是一个经过增强的代理重试循环，可自动生成对比数据，无需人工标注。提取出的规则被组织成一种面向输入的决策树，根据可观测的输入特征路由指令。在四个推理与合规基准测试中，ContraPrompt在所有四项任务上均优于GEPA（Agrawal等，2026），绝对性能提升分别为：HotPotQA +8.29个百分点（相对提升+20.8%）、GDPR-Bench +2.21个百分点（相对提升+18.2%）、GPQA Diamond +7.14个百分点（相对提升+10.6%）、BBH +0.74个百分点（相对提升+0.85%）。消融实验表明，二元轨迹对比性是关键组件，移除后平均相对性能下降达-16%。在53个EvalSet黑盒优化问题上，ContraPrompt在相同预算下击败GEPA 11次，打平41次，仅在1个任务上落后。在FiNER-139金融命名实体识别任务（Loukas等，2022）中，ContraPrompt相较于未优化基线提升+7.77个百分点（相对提升+11.6%），较GEPA提升+1.94个百分点（相对提升+2.66%），且分支条件与美国通用会计准则（US GAAP）标准的金融工具分类高度一致。

title: Weaponizing the Commons: A Taxonomy and Detection Framework of Abuse on GitHub
authors: Yuli Cheng, Xiaoyu Zhang, Jiongchi Yu, Shiqing Ma, Chao Shen, Yang Liu
abstract: GitHub plays a critical role in modern software supply chains, making its security an important research concern. Existing studies have primarily focused on CI/CD automation, collaboration patterns, and community management, while abuse behaviors on GitHub have received little systematic investigation. In this paper, we systematically review and summarize reported GitHub abuse behaviors and conduct an empirical analysis of publicly available abuse cases, curating a manually labeled dataset of 392 GitHub instances. Based on this investigation, we propose a comprehensive taxonomy that characterizes their diverse symptoms and root causes from a software security perspective. Building on this taxonomy, we develop a unified detection framework capable of identifying all abuse categories across repositories and user accounts. Evaluated on the constructed dataset, the proposed framework achieves high performance across all categories (e.g., F1-score exceeding 89%). Collectively, this work advances the understanding of GitHub abuse behaviors and lays the groundwork for large-scale, systematic analysis of the GitHub platform to strengthen software supply chain security.
title_zh: 武器化公地：GitHub 上滥用行为的分类与检测框架
abstract_zh: GitHub 在现代软件供应链中扮演着至关重要的角色，其安全性已成为重要的研究课题。现有研究主要聚焦于 CI/CD 自动化、协作模式以及社区管理，而对 GitHub 上滥用行为的系统性研究却相对不足。本文系统地回顾并总结了已报告的 GitHub 滥用行为，并对公开可获取的滥用案例进行了实证分析，构建了一个由 392 个 GitHub 实例组成的手动标注数据集。基于此项调查，我们提出了一套全面的分类体系，从软件安全的角度刻画了这些滥用行为的多样化表现及其根本原因。在此分类体系的基础上，我们设计并实现了一个统一的检测框架，能够跨仓库和用户账户识别所有类型的滥用行为。在所构建数据集上的评估结果显示，该框架在各类别上均表现出色（例如 F1 分数超过 89%）。总体而言，本研究深化了对 GitHub 滥用行为的理解，为大规模、系统性的 GitHub 平台分析奠定了基础，有助于增强软件供应链的安全性。

title: SPREG: Structured Plan Repair with Entropy-Guided Test-Time Intervention for Large Language Model Reasoning
authors: Xuan Wang, Yu Ming, Xinhao Zhong, Xinyu Yu, Wenjie Wang, Shuai Chen, Wei Lin
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are prone to logical hallucinations and stochastic drifts during long-chain reasoning. While Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) can improve instruction adherence, standard static implementations often cause semantic dilution and linguistic degradation. We propose SPREG (Structured Plan-guided Real-time Entropy Gating), a lightweight inference-time framework for surgical error rectification. SPREG employs an adaptive dual-threshold mechanism to monitor real-time entropy, identifying sudden ``entropy spikes'' as reliable indicators of logical failure. Upon detection, it triggers a dynamic repair by replacing uninformative null-priors with reference distributions synthesized from historical high-confidence states. By modulating guidance intensity according to structured reasoning stages (e.g., Action, Observation), SPREG steers the model back to a stable manifold without compromising fluency. Our experiments demonstrate significant gains, notably a 20.0% absolute accuracy improvement on AIME25, while effectively suppressing uncontrolled entropy drift in complex tasks.
title_zh: SPREG：基于熵引导的测试时干预的大语言模型推理结构化计划修复
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在长链推理过程中容易出现逻辑幻觉和随机性漂移。尽管无分类器引导（CFG）能够提升指令遵循能力，但传统的静态实现方式常导致语义稀释和语言质量下降。我们提出SPREG（结构化计划引导的实时熵门控）——一种轻量级的推理时纠错框架，用于精准修复错误。SPREG采用自适应双阈值机制，实时监控熵值变化，将突发的“熵值激增”作为逻辑失败的可靠指标。一旦检测到异常，系统会动态触发修复机制，用从历史高置信度状态中合成的参考分布替代无信息的空先验。通过根据结构化推理阶段（如“行动”、“观察”）动态调节引导强度，SPREG能够在不损害语言流畅性的前提下，将模型重新引导回稳定流形。实验结果表明，该方法取得了显著性能提升，尤其在AIME25数据集上实现了20.0%的绝对准确率增长，同时有效抑制了复杂任务中的不可控熵漂移现象。

title: TitanCA: Lessons from Orchestrating LLM Agents to Discover 100+ CVEs
authors: Ting Zhang, Yikun Li, Chengran Yang, Ratnadira Widyasari, Yue Liu, Ngoc Tan Bui, Phuc Thanh Nguyen, Yan Naing Tun, Ivana Clairine Irsan, Huu Hung Nguyen, Huihui Huang, Jinfeng Jiang, Lwin Khin Shar, Eng Lieh Ouh, David Lo, Hong Jin Kang, Yide Yin, Wen Bin Leow
abstract: Software vulnerabilities remain one of the most persistent threats to modern digital infrastructure. While static application security testing (SAST) tools have long served as the first line of defense, they suffer from high false-positive rates. This article presents TitanCA, a collaborative project between Singapore Management University and GovTech Singapore that orchestrates multiple large language model (LLM)-powered agents into a unified vulnerability discovery pipeline. Applied in open-source software, TitanCA has discovered 203 confirmed zero-day vulnerabilities and yielded 118 CVEs. We describe the four-module architecture, i.e., matching, filtering, inspection, and adaptation, and share key lessons from building and deploying an LLM-based vulnerability discovery solution in practice.
title_zh: TitanCA： orchestrating LLM Agents 发现100多个CVE的启示
abstract_zh: 软件漏洞仍然是现代数字基础设施面临的最持久威胁之一。尽管静态应用安全测试（SAST）工具长期以来被视为第一道防线，但其存在较高的误报率。本文介绍了由新加坡管理大学与新加坡政府科技局（GovTech Singapore）合作开发的TitanCA项目，该系统将多个基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体协同整合为一个统一的漏洞发现流程。在开源软件中的应用表明，TitanCA已成功发现203个经证实的零日漏洞，并产生了118个CVE编号。本文详细阐述了该系统的四模块架构——匹配、过滤、检测与自适应，并分享了在实际构建与部署基于大语言模型的漏洞发现解决方案过程中积累的关键经验教训。

title: Program Structure-aware Language Models: Targeted Software Testing beyond Textual Semantics
authors: Khang Tran, Khoa Nguyen, Cristian Borcea, NhatHai Phan
abstract: Recent advances in large language models for test case generation have improved branch coverage via prompt-engineered mutations. However, they still lack principled mechanisms for steering models toward specific high-risk execution branches, limiting their effectiveness for discovering subtle bugs and security vulnerabilities. We propose GLMTest, the first program structure-aware LLM framework for targeted test case generation that seamlessly integrates code property graphs and code semantics using a graph neural network and a language model to condition test case generation on execution branches. This structured conditioning enables controllable and branch-targeted test case generation, thereby potentially enhancing bug and security risk discovery. Experiments on real-world projects show that GLMTest built on a Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct model improves branch accuracy from 27.4% to 50.2% on TestGenEval benchmark compared with state-of-the-art LLMs, i.e., Claude-Sonnet-4.5 and GPT-4o-mini.
title_zh: 程序结构感知的语言模型：超越文本语义的定向软件测试
abstract_zh: 近年来，大型语言模型在测试用例生成方面的进展通过提示工程驱动的变异方法提升了分支覆盖率。然而，这些方法仍缺乏系统性机制来引导模型聚焦于特定的高风险执行分支，从而限制了其在发现细微缺陷和安全漏洞方面的有效性。为此，我们提出了GLMTest——首个面向程序结构感知的LLM测试用例生成框架。该框架通过图神经网络与语言模型的协同，无缝融合代码属性图与代码语义信息，以执行分支为条件进行测试用例生成。这种结构化条件控制实现了可调控、目标明确的测试用例生成，有望显著提升缺陷与安全风险的发现能力。在真实项目上的实验表明，基于Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct模型的GLMTest，在TestGenEval基准测试中将分支准确率从现有最先进LLM（如Claude-Sonnet-4.5和GPT-4o-mini）的27.4%提升至50.2%。

title: Stratagem: Learning Transferable Reasoning via Trajectory-Modulated Game Self-Play
authors: Xiachong Feng, Deyi Yin, Xiaocheng Feng, Yi Jiang, Libo Qin, Yangfan Ye, Lei Huang, Weitao Ma, Qiming Li, Yuxuan Gu, Bing Qin, Lingpeng Kong
abstract: Games offer a compelling paradigm for developing general reasoning capabilities in language models, as they naturally demand strategic planning, probabilistic inference, and adaptive decision-making. However, existing self-play approaches rely solely on terminal game outcomes, providing no mechanism to distinguish transferable reasoning patterns from game-specific heuristics. We present STRATAGEM, which addresses two fundamental barriers to reasoning transfer: domain specificity, where learned patterns remain anchored in game semantics, and contextual stasis, where static game contexts fail to cultivate progressive reasoning. STRATAGEM selectively reinforces trajectories exhibiting abstract, domain-agnostic reasoning through a Reasoning Transferability Coefficient, while incentivizing adaptive reasoning development via a Reasoning Evolution Reward. Experiments across mathematical reasoning, general reasoning, and code generation benchmarks demonstrate substantial improvements, with particularly strong gains on competition-level mathematics where multi-step reasoning is critical. Ablation studies and human evaluation confirm that both components contribute to transferable reasoning.
title_zh: 策略：通过轨迹调制的游戏自对弈实现可迁移推理的学习
abstract_zh: 游戏为语言模型发展通用推理能力提供了一个引人入胜的范式，因为它们天然要求战略规划、概率推断和适应性决策。然而，现有的自对弈方法仅依赖于游戏的最终结果，无法区分可迁移的推理模式与特定于游戏的启发式策略。我们提出了STRATAGEM，该方法解决了推理迁移中的两个根本性障碍：领域特异性问题，即学习到的模式仍局限于具体游戏的语义；以及情境僵化问题，即静态的游戏环境无法促进渐进式推理的发展。STRATAGEM通过引入“推理可迁移性系数”（Reasoning Transferability Coefficient），有选择地强化那些展现出抽象且跨领域通用推理的决策轨迹；同时，通过“推理进化奖励”（Reasoning Evolution Reward）激励模型发展动态适应的推理能力。在数学推理、通用推理和代码生成等多个基准测试中进行的实验表明，该方法取得了显著提升，尤其在竞赛级数学任务中表现突出，这类任务对多步推理能力尤为关键。消融实验和人工评估均证实，这两个组件共同促进了可迁移的推理能力。

title: AgenTEE: Confidential LLM Agent Execution on Edge Devices
authors: Sina Abdollahi, Mohammad M Maheri, Javad Forough, Amir Al Sadi, Josh Millar, David Kotz, Marios Kogias, Hamed Haddadi
abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents provide powerful automation capabilities, but they also create a substantially broader attack surface than traditional applications due to their tight integration with non-deterministic models and third-party services. While current deployments primarily rely on cloud-hosted services, emerging designs increasingly execute agents directly on edge devices to reduce latency and enhance user privacy. However, securely hosting such complex agent pipelines on edge devices remains challenging. These deployments must protect proprietary assets (e.g., system prompts and model weights) and sensitive runtime state on heterogeneous platforms that are vulnerable to software attacks and potentially controlled by malicious users. To address these challenges, we present AgenTEE, a system for deploying confidential agent pipelines on edge devices. AgenTEE places the agent runtime, inference engine, and third-party applications into independently attested confidential virtual machines (cVMs) and mediates their interaction through explicit, verifiable communication channels. Built on Arm Confidential Compute Architecture (CCA), a recent extension to Arm platforms, AgenTEE enforces strong system-level isolation of sensitive assets and runtime state. Our evaluation shows that such multi-cVMs system is practical, achieving near-native performance with less than 5.15% runtime overhead compared to commodity OS multi-process deployments.
title_zh: AgenTEE：边缘设备上的机密大语言模型代理执行
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）代理提供了强大的自动化能力，但由于其与非确定性模型及第三方服务的深度集成，相较于传统应用，其攻击面显著扩大。尽管当前部署主要依赖于云托管服务，但新兴的设计正越来越多地将代理直接运行在边缘设备上，以降低延迟并增强用户隐私保护。然而，在边缘设备上安全地托管此类复杂的代理流水线仍面临巨大挑战。这些部署必须在易受软件攻击、且可能被恶意用户控制的异构平台上，保护专有资产（如系统提示词和模型权重）以及敏感的运行时状态。为应对这些挑战，我们提出了AgenTEE——一种在边缘设备上部署机密代理流水线的系统。AgenTEE将代理运行时、推理引擎和第三方应用分别置于独立验证的机密虚拟机（cVMs）中，并通过显式且可验证的通信通道来协调它们之间的交互。该系统基于Arm可信计算架构（CCA），这是Arm平台的一项最新扩展，能够强制实施对敏感资产和运行时状态的强系统级隔离。我们的评估表明，这种多cVM架构是切实可行的，其性能接近原生水平，相较于通用操作系统下的多进程部署，运行时开销低于5.15%。

title: Compositional security definitions for higher-order where declassification
authors: Jan Menz, Andrew K. Hirsch, Peixuan Li, Deepak Garg
abstract: To ensure programs do not leak private data, we often want to be able to provide formal guarantees ensuring such data is handled correctly. Often, we cannot keep such data secret entirely; instead programmers specify how private data may be declassified. While security definitions for declassification exist, they mostly do not handle higher-order programs. In fact, in the higher-order setting no compositional security definition exists for intensional information-flow properties such as where declassification, which allows declassification in specific parts of a program. We use logical relations to build a model (and thus security definition) of where declassification. The key insight required for our model is that we must stop enforcing indistinguishability once a \emph{relevant declassification} has occurred. We show that the resulting security definition provides more security than the most related previous definition, which is for the lower-order setting. This paper is an extended version of the paper of the same name published at OOPSLA 2023 ([21]).
title_zh: 高阶去保密的组合安全性定义
abstract_zh: 为了确保程序不会泄露私有数据，我们通常希望提供形式化保证，以确保此类数据得到正确处理。然而，我们往往无法完全保密这些数据；相反，程序员需要指定私有数据可以被解密（declassify）的方式。尽管已存在针对解密的安全定义，但它们大多无法处理高阶程序。事实上，在高阶编程环境中，尚不存在适用于内在意向性信息流属性（如解密位置）的组合式安全定义。本文利用逻辑关系构建了一个模型（从而也建立了一个安全定义），用于描述解密的位置。我们模型中的关键洞察在于：一旦发生“相关解密”（relevant declassification），就必须停止强制要求不可区分性。我们证明，由此产生的安全定义比此前最相关的、仅适用于低阶程序的安全定义提供了更强的安全保障。本文是发表于OOPSLA 2023年同名论文[21]的扩展版本。

title: Benchmarking System Dynamics AI Assistants: Cloud Versus Local LLMs on CLD Extraction and Discussion
authors: Terry Leitch
abstract: We present a systematic evaluation of large language model families -- spanning both proprietary cloud APIs and locally-hosted open-source models -- on two purpose-built benchmarks for System Dynamics AI assistance: the \textbf{CLD Leaderboard} (53 tests, structured causal loop diagram extraction) and the \textbf{Discussion Leaderboard} (interactive model discussion, feedback explanation, and model building coaching). On CLD extraction, cloud models achieve 77--89\% overall pass rates; the best local model reaches 77\% (Kimi~K2.5~GGUF~Q3, zero-shot engine), matching mid-tier cloud performance. On Discussion, the best local models achieve 50--100\% on model building steps and 47--75\% on feedback explanation, but only 0--50\% on error fixing -- a category dominated by long-context prompts that expose memory limits in local deployments. A central contribution of this paper is a systematic analysis of \textit{model type effects} on performance: we compare reasoning vs.\ instruction-tuned architectures, GGUF (llama.cpp) vs.\ MLX (mlx\_lm) backends, and quantization levels (Q3 / Q4\_K\_M / MLX-3bit / MLX-4bit / MLX-6bit) across the same underlying model families. We find that backend choice has larger practical impact than quantization level: mlx\_lm does not enforce JSON schema constraints, requiring explicit prompt-level JSON instructions, while llama.cpp grammar-constrained sampling handles JSON reliably but causes indefinite generation on long-context prompts for dense models. We document the full parameter sweep ($t$, $p$, $k$) for all local models, cleaned timing data (stuck requests excluded), and a practitioner guide for running 671B--123B parameter models on Apple~Silicon.
title_zh: 基准测试系统动力学AI助手：云端与本地大语言模型在因果循环图提取与讨论中的表现对比
abstract_zh:
我们对大型语言模型家族——涵盖专有的云API和本地部署的开源模型——在两个专为系统动力学AI辅助设计的基准测试上进行了系统性评估：\textbf{CLD排行榜}（53项测试，结构化因果回路图提取）和\textbf{讨论排行榜}（模型交互讨论、反馈解释及模型构建指导）。在因果回路图提取任务中，云模型的整体通过率达到了77%–89%；表现最佳的本地模型达到77%（Kimi K2.5 GGUF Q3，零样本引擎），与中等水平的云模型性能相当。在讨论任务中，最佳本地模型在模型构建步骤上的得分范围为50%–100%，在反馈解释任务上得分为47%–75%，但在错误修复任务上仅能获得0%–50%的成绩——这一类别主要涉及长上下文提示，暴露出本地部署在内存容量方面的局限性。

本文的核心贡献之一是对**模型类型效应**的系统性分析：我们对比了推理型与指令微调架构、GGUF（llama.cpp）与MLX（mlx\_lm）后端，以及不同量化级别（Q3 / Q4\_K\_M / MLX-3bit / MLX-4bit / MLX-6bit）在相同基础模型族上的表现。研究发现，后端选择对实际性能的影响大于量化级别：mlx\_lm不强制JSON模式约束，需依赖显式的提示级JSON指令；而llama.cpp的语法约束采样虽能可靠生成JSON，但对密集模型在长上下文提示下会导致无限生成问题。

本文还完整记录了所有本地模型的参数扫描结果（$t$, $p$, $k$），清理后的运行时间数据（剔除卡死请求），并提供了一份面向实践者的指南，详细介绍如何在Apple Silicon设备上运行参数量为671B至123B的模型。

title: FUSE: Ensembling Verifiers with Zero Labeled Data
authors: Joonhyuk Lee, Virginia Ma, Sarah Zhao, Yash Nair, Asher Spector, Regev Cohen, Emmanuel J. Candès
abstract: Verification of model outputs is rapidly emerging as a key primitive for both training and real-world deployment of large language models (LLMs). In practice, this often involves using imperfect LLM judges and reward models since ground truth acquisition can be time-consuming and expensive. We introduce Fully Unsupervised Score Ensembling (FUSE), a method for improving verification quality by ensembling verifiers without access to ground truth correctness labels. The key idea behind FUSE is to control conditional dependencies between verifiers in a manner that improves the unsupervised performance of a class of spectral algorithms from the ensembling literature. Despite requiring zero ground truth labels, FUSE typically matches or improves upon semi-supervised alternatives in test-time scaling experiments with diverse sets of generator models, verifiers, and benchmarks. In particular, we validate our method on both conventional academic benchmarks such as GPQA Diamond and on frontier, unsaturated benchmarks such as Humanity's Last Exam and IMO Shortlist questions.
title_zh: FUSE：零标注数据下的验证器集成
abstract_zh: 模型输出的验证正迅速成为大型语言模型（LLMs）训练和实际部署中的关键基础能力。在实践中，由于获取真实标签往往耗时且成本高昂，通常会使用不完美的LLM评判者和奖励模型来替代。我们提出了完全无监督评分集成方法（Fully Unsupervised Score Ensembling, FUSE），通过在无需访问真实正确性标签的情况下集成多个验证器，以提升验证质量。FUSE的核心思想是通过控制验证器之间的条件依赖关系，从而优化来自集成学习文献中一类谱算法在无监督场景下的性能表现。尽管FUSE完全不需要真实标签，但在多种生成模型、验证器和基准测试组合的推理时扩展实验中，其表现通常与半监督方法相当甚至更优。特别地，我们在传统的学术基准（如GPQA Diamond）以及前沿且尚未饱和的基准（如“人类最后的考试”和IMO短题集）上验证了该方法的有效性。

title: Fast and Forgettable: A Controlled Study of Novices' Performance, Learning, Workload, and Emotion in AI-Assisted and Human Pair Programming Paradigms
authors: Nicholas Gardella, James Prather, Juho Leinonen, Paul Denny, Raymond Pettit, Sara L. Riggs
abstract: Code-generating Artificial Intelligence has gained popularity within both professional and educational programming settings over the past several years. While research and pedagogy are beginning to cope with this change, computing students are left to bear the unforeseen consequences of AI amidst a dearth of empirical evidence about its effects. Though pair programming between students is well studied and known to be beneficial to self-efficacy and academic achievement, it remains underutilized and further threatened by the proposition that AI can replace a human programming partner. In this paper, we present a controlled pair programming study with 22 participants who wrote Python code under time pressure in teams of two and individually with GitHub Copilot for 20 minutes each. They were incentivized by bonus compensation to balance performance with understanding and were retested individually on the programming tasks after a retention interval of one week. Subjective measures of workload and emotion as well as objective measures of performance and learning (retest performance) were collected. Results showed that participants performed significantly better with GitHub Copilot than their human teammate, and several dimensions of their workload were significantly reduced. However, the emotional effect of the human teammate was significantly more positive and arousing as compared to working with Copilot. Furthermore, there was a nonsignificant absolute retest performance reduction in the AI condition and a larger retest performance decrement in the AI condition. We recommend that educators strongly consider revisiting pair programming as an educational tool in addition to embracing modern AI.
title_zh: 快速而易忘：新手在AI辅助与人工配对编程模式下的表现、学习、工作负荷及情绪的控制研究
abstract_zh: 近年来，代码生成型人工智能在专业和教育编程领域日益流行。尽管研究与教学实践正逐步应对这一变化，但计算类学生却不得不面对人工智能带来的诸多未知后果，而目前关于其影响的实证证据仍十分匮乏。虽然学生之间的结对编程已被广泛研究，并被证实有助于提升自我效能感和学业成就，但该方法仍未能得到充分应用，且正面临新的挑战——即人工智能可能取代人类编程伙伴。本文通过一项受控的结对编程实验，对22名参与者进行了研究：他们以两人小组形式在限时20分钟内编写Python代码，随后又单独使用GitHub Copilot完成相同任务。每位参与者均获得额外奖金激励，以平衡表现与理解。一周后，所有参与者再次独立完成相同编程任务进行再测。研究收集了主观层面的工作负荷与情绪状态数据，以及客观层面的表现与学习成效（再测成绩）数据。结果显示，相较于人类搭档，参与者在使用GitHub Copilot时表现显著更优，且多项工作负荷指标显著降低。然而，与人类搭档合作所带来的情绪体验显著更为积极且更具激发性，而使用Copilot则缺乏这种情感激励。此外，AI组在再测中的绝对成绩下降不显著，但相对于对照组，其成绩下降幅度更大。因此，我们建议教育工作者在积极采用现代人工智能的同时，应重新审视并重视结对编程作为教学工具的价值。

title: AutoPPA: Automated Circuit PPA Optimization via Contrastive Code-based Rule Library Learning
authors: Chongxiao Li, Pengwei Jin, Di Huang, Guangrun Sun, Husheng Han, Jianan Mu, Xinyao Zheng, Jiaguo Zhu, Shuyi Xing, Hanjun Wei, Tianyun Ma, Shuyao Cheng, Rui Zhang, Ying Wang, Zidong Du, Qi Guo, Xing Hu
abstract: Performance, power, and area (PPA) optimization is a fundamental task in RTL design, requiring a precise understanding of circuit functionality and the relationship between circuit structures and PPA metrics. Recent studies attempt to automate this process using LLMs, but neither feedback-based nor knowledge-based methods are efficient enough, as they either design without any prior knowledge or rely heavily on human-summarized optimization rules. In this paper, we propose AutoPPA, a fully automated PPA optimization framework. The key idea is to automatically generate optimization rules that enhance the search for optimal solutions. To do this, AutoPPA employs an Explore-Evaluate-Induce ($E^2I$) workflow that contrasts and abstracts rules from diverse generated code pairs rather than manually defined prior knowledge, yielding better optimization patterns. To make the abstracted rules more generalizable, AutoPPA employs an adaptive multi-step search framework that adopts the most effective rules for a given circuit. Experiments show that AutoPPA outperforms both the manual optimization and the state-of-the-art methods SymRTLO and RTLRewriter.
title_zh: AutoPPA：基于对比编码规则库学习的自动化电路PPA优化
abstract_zh: 性能、功耗和面积（PPA）优化是RTL设计中的基础任务，需要对电路功能以及电路结构与PPA指标之间的关系有精确的理解。近年来的研究尝试利用大语言模型（LLMs）来自动化这一过程，但基于反馈或基于知识的方法效率均不够理想：前者缺乏先验知识，后者则过度依赖人工总结的优化规则。本文提出了一种完全自动化的PPA优化框架——AutoPPA。其核心思想是自动生成优化规则，以提升寻找最优解的效率。为此，AutoPPA采用了一种“探索-评估-归纳”（Explore-Evaluate-Induce, $E^2I$）的工作流程，通过对比和抽象多种生成代码对中的规律，而非依赖人工定义的先验知识，从而提炼出更优的优化模式。为进一步增强所抽象规则的泛化能力，AutoPPA引入了一种自适应多步搜索框架，能够针对特定电路选择最有效的规则。实验结果表明，AutoPPA在性能上显著优于人工优化方法以及当前最先进的方法SymRTLO和RTLRewriter。

title: TypeScript Repository Indexing for Code Agent Retrieval
authors: Junsong Pu, Yichen Li, Zhuangbin Chen
abstract: Graph-based code indexing can improve context retrieval for LLM-based code agents by preserving call chains and dependency relationships that keyword search and similarity retrieval often miss. ABCoder is an open-source framework that parses codebases into a function-level code index called UniAST, but its existing parsers combine lightweight AST parsers for syntactic analysis with language servers for semantic resolution, but because LSP-based resolution requires a JSON-RPC call for each symbol lookup, these per-symbol calls become a bottleneck on large TypeScript repositories. We present abcoder-ts-parser, a TypeScript parser built on the TypeScript Compiler API that works directly with the compiler's AST, semantic information, and module resolution logic. We evaluate the parser on three open-source TypeScript projects with up to 1.2 million lines of code and find that it produces reliable indexes significantly more efficiently than the existing architecture. For a live demonstration, watch: https://youtu.be/ryssr7ouvdE
title_zh: 代码代理检索的 TypeScript 仓库索引
abstract_zh:
基于图的代码索引可以通过保留调用链和依赖关系，提升基于大语言模型（LLM）的代码智能体在上下文检索方面的效果，而这些信息往往会被关键词搜索和相似性检索所忽略。ABCoder 是一个开源框架，它将代码库解析为一种称为 UniAST 的函数级代码索引。然而，其现有解析器结合了轻量级 AST 解析器进行语法分析，以及语言服务器（LSP）进行语义解析。由于基于 LSP 的语义解析需要为每个符号查找发起一次 JSON-RPC 调用，这种逐符号调用在大型 TypeScript 项目中成为性能瓶颈。

为此，我们提出了 abcoder-ts-parser——一个基于 TypeScript 编译器 API 构建的 TypeScript 解析器。该解析器直接利用编译器的 AST、语义信息和模块解析逻辑，避免了外部调用开销。我们在三个开源 TypeScript 项目上对解析器进行了评估，代码规模最高达 120 万行，结果表明，新架构生成可靠索引的效率显著优于原有方案。

如需实时演示，请观看：https://youtu.be/ryssr7ouvdE

title: River-LLM: Large Language Model Seamless Exit Based on KV Share
authors: Yingtao Shen, An Zou
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated exceptional performance across diverse domains but are increasingly constrained by high inference latency. Early Exit has emerged as a promising solution to accelerate inference by dynamically bypassing redundant layers. However, in decoder-only architectures, the efficiency of Early Exit is severely bottlenecked by the KV Cache Absence problem, where skipped layers fail to provide the necessary historical states for subsequent tokens. Existing solutions, such as recomputation or masking, either introduce significant latency overhead or incur severe precision loss, failing to bridge the gap between theoretical layer reduction and practical wall-clock speedup. In this paper, we propose River-LLM, a training-free framework that enables seamless token-level Early Exit. River-LLM introduces a lightweight KV-Shared Exit River that allows the backbone's missing KV cache to be naturally generated and preserved during the exit process, eliminating the need for costly recovery operations. Furthermore, we utilize state transition similarity within decoder blocks to predict cumulative KV errors and guide precise exit decisions. Extensive experiments on mathematical reasoning and code generation tasks demonstrate that River-LLM achieves 1.71 to 2.16 times of practical speedup while maintaining high generation quality.
title_zh: River-LLM：基于KV共享的大型语言模型无缝退出机制
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在多个领域展现了卓越的性能，但其推理延迟日益成为瓶颈。早期退出（Early Exit）作为一种有前景的加速方案，通过动态跳过冗余层来提升推理效率。然而，在仅解码器架构中，早期退出的效率受到“KV缓存缺失”问题的严重制约：被跳过的层无法为后续token提供必要的历史状态信息。现有解决方案如重计算或掩码机制，要么引入显著的延迟开销，要么造成严重的精度损失，难以弥合理论上的层数减少与实际运行时间加速之间的差距。本文提出River-LLM——一种无需训练的框架，实现无缝的逐token级早期退出。River-LLM引入了一种轻量级的KV共享退出路径（KV-Shared Exit River），能够在退出过程中自然生成并保留骨干网络所缺失的KV缓存，从而避免了昂贵的恢复操作。此外，我们利用解码器块内的状态转移相似性，预测累积的KV误差，并据此指导精确的退出决策。在数学推理和代码生成任务上的大量实验表明，River-LLM在保持高质量生成的同时，实现了1.71至2.16倍的实际加速。

title: CodePivot: Bootstrapping Multilingual Transpilation in LLMs via Reinforcement Learning without Parallel Corpora
authors: Shangyu Li, Juyong Jiang, Meibo Ren, Sizhe Zhong, Huiri Tan, Yunhao Gou, Xu Han, Chun Yong Chong, Yun Peng, Jiasi Shen
abstract: Transpilation, or code translation, aims to convert source code from one programming language (PL) to another. It is beneficial for many downstream applications, from modernizing large legacy codebases to augmenting data for low-resource PLs. Recent large language model (LLM)-based approaches have demonstrated immense potential for code translation. Among these approaches, training-based methods are particularly important because LLMs currently do not effectively adapt to domain-specific settings that suffer from a lack of knowledge without targeted training. This limitation is evident in transpilation tasks involving low-resource PLs. However, existing training-based approaches rely on a pairwise transpilation paradigm, making it impractical to support a diverse range of PLs. This limitation is particularly prominent for low-resource PLs due to a scarcity of training data. Furthermore, these methods suffer from suboptimal reinforcement learning (RL) reward formulations. To address these limitations, we propose CodePivot, a training framework that leverages Python as an intermediate representation (IR), augmented by a novel RL reward mechanism, Aggressive-Partial-Functional reward, to bootstrap the model's multilingual transpilation ability without requiring parallel corpora. Experiments involving 10 PLs show that the resulting 7B model, trained on Python-to-Others tasks, consistently improves performance across both general and low-resource PL-related transpilation tasks. It outperforms substantially larger mainstream models with hundreds of billions more parameters, such as Deepseek-R1 and Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507, on Python-to-Others tasks and Others-to-All tasks, respectively. In addition, it outperforms its counterpart trained directly on Any-to-Any tasks on general transpilation tasks. The code and data are available at https://github.com/lishangyu-hkust/CodePivot.
title_zh: CodePivot：通过强化学习实现无需平行语料库的多语言转译在大语言模型中的自举
abstract_zh:
代码转译（或称代码翻译）旨在将源代码从一种编程语言（PL）转换为另一种。这一技术对众多下游应用具有重要意义，例如现代化大型遗留代码库，以及为低资源编程语言扩充数据。近年来，基于大语言模型（LLM）的代码翻译方法展现出巨大潜力。在这些方法中，训练型方法尤为重要，因为当前的LLM难以有效适应缺乏特定知识的领域场景，除非经过针对性训练。这一局限在涉及低资源编程语言的转译任务中尤为明显。然而，现有的训练型方法依赖于成对的转译范式，这使得它们难以支持多样化的编程语言。对于低资源编程语言而言，这一限制尤为突出，原因在于训练数据极度稀缺。此外，这些方法还存在强化学习（RL）奖励机制设计不佳的问题。

为解决上述挑战，我们提出了一种名为 CodePivot 的训练框架，该框架以 Python 作为中间表示（IR），并引入一种新颖的强化学习奖励机制——“激进部分功能奖励”（Aggressive-Partial-Functional reward），从而在无需平行语料的情况下，有效提升模型的多语言代码转译能力。实验涵盖10种编程语言，结果表明，基于 Python-to-Others 任务训练得到的70亿参数模型，在通用及低资源编程语言相关的转译任务中均表现出持续优异的性能。该模型在 Python-to-Others 任务上显著超越了参数量达数百亿的主流模型 Deepseek-R1；在 Others-to-All 任务上则大幅优于 Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507。此外，它在通用转译任务上的表现也优于直接在 Any-to-Any 任务上训练的对应模型。相关代码与数据已公开，地址为：https://github.com/lishangyu-hkust/CodePivot。

title: Neural Garbage Collection: Learning to Forget while Learning to Reason
authors: Michael Y. Li, Jubayer Ibn Hamid, Emily B. Fox, Noah D. Goodman
abstract: Chain-of-thought reasoning has driven striking advances in language model capability, yet every reasoning step grows the KV cache, creating a bottleneck to scaling this paradigm further. Current approaches manage these constraints on the model's behalf using hand-designed criteria. A more scalable approach would let end-to-end learning subsume this design choice entirely, following a broader pattern in deep learning. After all, if a model can learn to reason, why can't it learn to forget? We introduce Neural Garbage Collection (NGC), in which a language model learns to forget while learning to reason, trained end-to-end from outcome-based task reward alone. As the model reasons, it periodically pauses, decides which KV cache entries to evict, and continues to reason conditioned on the remaining cache. By treating tokens in a chain-of-thought and cache-eviction decisions as discrete actions sampled from the language model, we can use reinforcement learning to jointly optimize how the model reasons and how it manages its own memory: what the model evicts shapes what it remembers, what it remembers shapes its reasoning, and the correctness of that reasoning determines its reward. Crucially, the model learns this behavior entirely from a single learning signal - the outcome-based task reward - without supervised fine-tuning or proxy objectives. On Countdown, AMC, and AIME tasks, NGC maintains strong accuracy relative to the full-cache upper bound at 2-3x peak KV cache size compression and substantially outperforms eviction baselines. Our results are a first step towards a broader vision where end-to-end optimization drives both capability and efficiency in language models.
title_zh: 神经垃圾回收：在推理中学会遗忘
abstract_zh: 思维链推理已显著提升了语言模型的能力，但每一步推理都会增加KV缓存的大小，成为进一步扩展该范式的主要瓶颈。目前的方法通过手工设计的标准来代为管理这些限制。而一种更具可扩展性的方法是让端到端学习完全取代这一设计选择，这符合深度学习中的普遍趋势。毕竟，如果模型能够学会推理，为何不能学会遗忘？我们提出了神经垃圾回收（Neural Garbage Collection, NGC），即语言模型在学习推理的同时也学会遗忘，仅通过基于任务结果的奖励信号进行端到端训练。在推理过程中，模型会周期性地暂停，决定哪些KV缓存条目应被剔除，然后基于剩余缓存继续推理。通过将思维链中的token和缓存剔除决策视为由语言模型采样的离散动作，我们可以使用强化学习联合优化模型的推理方式及其自身内存管理策略：模型剔除的内容决定了它记住什么，记住的内容又影响其推理过程，而推理的正确性则决定了最终获得的奖励。关键在于，模型完全依赖单一的学习信号——基于任务结果的奖励——来学习这种行为，无需监督微调或代理目标。在Countdown、AMC和AIME等任务中，NGC在仅需2至3倍峰值KV缓存大小的情况下，仍能保持与全缓存上限相当的高准确率，并显著优于传统的缓存剔除基线方法。我们的成果标志着迈向一个更广阔的愿景的第一步：即通过端到端优化，同时提升语言模型的能力与效率。

title: MASFuzzer: Fuzz Driver Generation and Adaptive Scheduling via Multidimensional API Sequences
authors: Xingyu Liu, Zengqin Huang, Xiang Gao, Hailong Sun
abstract: Fuzz testing of software libraries relies on fuzz drivers to invoke library APIs. Traditionally, these drivers are written manually by developers - a process that is time-consuming and often inadequate for exercising complex program behaviors. While recent studies have explored the use of Large Language Models (LLMs) to automate fuzz driver generation, the resulting drivers often fail to cover deep program branches. To address these challenges, we propose MASFUZZER, a fuzzing framework that integrates multidimensional API sequence construction with adaptive fuzzing scheduling strategies to improve library testing. At its core, MASFUZZER synthesizes context-relevant API call sequences by referring to API usage examples from the codebase and applying mutation-propagation-based and semantic-aware API sequence mining. These multidimensional API sequences serve as the basis for LLMs to generate effective initial drivers. In addition, MASFUZZER incorporates a coverage-guided scheduler that prioritizes testing time for the most promising drivers, along with a driver mutation strategy to evolve them. This enables systematic generation of fuzz drivers to explore previously untested code regions. We evaluate MASFUZZER on 12 widely used open-source libraries. The results show that MASFUZZER achieves 8.54 percent higher code coverage than state-of-the-art techniques. Moreover, MASFUZZER uncovers 16 previously unknown vulnerabilities in extensively tested libraries, with 14 confirmed by developers and 9 assigned CVE identifiers. These results indicate that MASFUZZER provides an efficient and practical approach for fuzzing software libraries.
title_zh: MASFuzzer：基于多维API序列的模糊测试驱动生成与自适应调度
abstract_zh: 软件库的模糊测试依赖于模糊驱动程序来调用库的API。传统上，这些驱动程序由开发人员手动编写，这一过程耗时且往往无法充分覆盖复杂的程序行为。尽管近期研究探索了利用大语言模型（LLMs）自动化生成模糊驱动程序的方法，但生成的驱动程序通常难以覆盖深层的程序分支。为解决上述挑战，我们提出了MASFUZZER，一个融合多维度API序列构建与自适应模糊调度策略的模糊测试框架，以提升库测试的效果。MASFUZZER的核心在于：通过参考代码库中已有的API使用实例，结合基于变异传播和语义感知的API序列挖掘方法，合成上下文相关的API调用序列，从而为大语言模型生成高效初始驱动程序提供基础。此外，MASFUZZER引入了一种基于覆盖率引导的调度器，优先分配测试时间给最具潜力的驱动程序，并采用驱动程序变异策略对它们进行持续演化。这使得系统性地生成模糊驱动程序成为可能，从而探索此前未被覆盖的代码区域。我们在12个广泛使用的开源库上对MASFUZZER进行了评估。结果表明，MASFUZZER相比当前最先进的技术，代码覆盖率提升了8.54%。此外，MASFUZZER在经过充分测试的库中发现了16个此前未知的漏洞，其中14个已得到开发者确认，9个已被分配CVE编号。这些结果表明，MASFUZZER为软件库的模糊测试提供了一种高效且实用的新方法。

title: LEPO: \underline{L}atent R\underline{e}asoning \underline{P}olicy \underline{O}ptimization for Large Language~Models
authors: Yuyan Zhou, Jiarui Yu, Hande Dong, Zhezheng Hao, Hong Wang, Jianqing Zhang, Qiang Lin
abstract: Recently, latent reasoning has been introduced into large language models (LLMs) to leverage rich information within a continuous space. However, without stochastic sampling, these methods inevitably collapse to deterministic inference, failing to discover diverse reasoning paths. To bridge the gap, we inject controllable stochasticity into latent reasoning via Gumbel-Softmax, restoring LLMs' exploratory capacity and enhancing their compatibility with Reinforcement Learning (RL). Building on this, we propose \textbf{\underline{L}}atent R\textbf{\underline{e}}asoning \textbf{\underline{P}}olicy \textbf{\underline{O}}ptimization~(\textbf{LEPO}), a novel framework that applies RL directly to continuous latent representations. Specifically, in rollout stage, LEPO maintains stochasticity to enable diverse trajectory sampling, while in optimization stage, LEPO constructs a unified gradient estimation for both latent representations and discrete tokens. Extensive experiments show that LEPO significantly outperforms existing RL methods for discrete and latent reasoning.
title_zh: LEPO：面向大语言模型的潜在推理策略优化
abstract_zh: 最近，隐式推理被引入大型语言模型（LLMs）中，以利用连续空间中的丰富信息。然而，在缺乏随机采样的情况下，这些方法不可避免地退化为确定性推理，无法发现多样化的推理路径。为弥合这一差距，我们通过Gumbel-Softmax向隐式推理注入可控的随机性，恢复了LLMs的探索能力，并增强了其与强化学习（RL）的兼容性。基于此，我们提出了一个新颖的框架——**L**atent **R**easoning **P**olicy **O**ptimization（LEPO），该框架直接将强化学习应用于连续的隐式表示。具体而言，在滚动（rollout）阶段，LEPO保持随机性，以实现多样化轨迹采样；而在优化阶段，LEPO构建了一个统一的梯度估计方法，同时适用于隐式表示和离散标记。大量实验表明，LEPO在离散推理和隐式推理方面均显著优于现有的强化学习方法。

title: Cache-Related Smells in GitLab CI/CD: Comprehensive Catalog, Automated Detection, and Empirical Evidence
authors: Francesco Urdih, Theodoros Theodoropoulos, Uwe Zdun
abstract: Continuous Integration and Deployment (CI/CD) facilitate rapid software delivery, making fast feedback and minimal downtime essential. While caching has been shown to be an effective technique for tackling pipeline performance and reliability issues, existing works have primarily focused on missing dependency caches, ignoring other types of caches and cache misconfigurations. In this paper, we present a comprehensive catalog of ten cache-related smells in GitLab CI/CD that negatively impact performance and reliability, validated on a corpus of grey literature. To address the smells, we propose CROSSER, a tool that automatically detects seven of the ten smells. We evaluate CROSSER on a manually labeled dataset of 82 mature projects, achieving an overall F1 score of 0.98. Finally, we investigate the presence of smells across a large dataset of 228 mature open-source projects and outline our empirical findings. Our results show a widespread frequency of the smells, as only 11% of the projects do not present any. We also show that developers may not be aware of higher-level caching functionalities.
title_zh: GitLab CI/CD 中的缓存相关异味：全面目录、自动化检测与实证证据
abstract_zh: 持续集成与部署（CI/CD）促进了软件的快速交付，使得快速反馈和最小化停机时间变得至关重要。尽管缓存已被证明是解决流水线性能和可靠性问题的有效手段，但现有研究主要聚焦于依赖项缓存缺失的问题，而忽略了其他类型的缓存以及缓存配置错误。本文提出了一份全面的GitLab CI/CD中十种与缓存相关的“异味”（smells）清单，这些异味对性能和可靠性产生负面影响，并在一份灰色文献语料库上进行了验证。为应对这些异味，我们提出了CROSSER工具，可自动检测其中七种异味。我们在一个经过人工标注的82个成熟项目数据集上评估了CROSSER，整体F1得分为0.98。最后，我们对228个成熟开源项目的大型数据集进行了分析，探讨了这些异味的分布情况，并总结了实证发现。结果表明，这些异味普遍存在：仅有11%的项目未出现任何一种异味。此外，我们还发现开发者可能并未充分意识到更高层级缓存功能的存在与作用。

title: Latent Preference Modeling for Cross-Session Personalized Tool Calling
authors: Yejin Yoon, Minseo Kim, Taeuk Kim
abstract: Users often omit essential details in their requests to LLM-based agents, resulting in under-specified inputs for tool use. This poses a fundamental challenge for tool-augmented agents, as API execution typically requires complete arguments, highlighting the need for personalized tool calling. To study this problem, we introduce MPT, a benchmark comprising 265 multi-session dialogues that cover three challenges: Preference Recall, Preference Induction, and Preference Transfer. We also propose PRefine, a test-time memory-augmented method that represents user preferences as evolving hypotheses. Through a generate--verify--refine loop, it extracts reusable constraints from history and improves tool-calling accuracy while using only 1.24% of the tokens required by full-history prompting. These results indicate that robust personalization in agentic systems depends on memory that captures the reasons behind user choices, not just the choices themselves.
title_zh: 跨会话个性化工具调用的潜在偏好建模
abstract_zh: 用户在向基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体提出请求时，常常省略关键细节，导致工具调用所需的输入信息不完整。这一问题对增强型工具的智能体构成了根本性挑战，因为API执行通常需要完整的参数，凸显了个性化工具调用的必要性。为研究该问题，我们提出了MPT基准，包含265个跨会话对话，涵盖三大挑战：偏好回忆（Preference Recall）、偏好推断（Preference Induction）和偏好迁移（Preference Transfer）。同时，我们提出了PRefine方法——一种测试阶段的记忆增强技术，将用户偏好表示为不断演化的假设。通过“生成—验证—精炼”循环，该方法能够从历史交互中提取可复用的约束条件，在仅使用全历史提示所需1.24% token的情况下，显著提升了工具调用的准确性。这些结果表明，智能体系统中实现稳健个性化，依赖于能够捕捉用户决策背后原因的记忆机制，而不仅仅是记录用户的选择本身。

title: Scaling Human-AI Coding Collaboration Requires a Governable Consensus Layer
authors: Tianfu Wang, Zhezheng Hao, Yin Wu, Wei Wu, Qiang Lin, Hande Dong, Nicholas Jing Yuan, Hui Xiong
abstract: Vibe coding produces correct, executable code at speed, but leaves no record of the structural commitments, dependencies, or evidence behind it. Reviewers cannot determine what invariants were assumed, what changed, or why a regression occurred. This is not a generation failure but a control failure: the dominant artifact of AI-assisted development (code plus chat history) performs dimension collapse, flattening complex system topology into low-dimensional text and making systems opaque and fragile under change. We propose Agentic Consensus: a paradigm in which the consensus layer C, an operable world model represented as a typed property graph, replaces code as the primary artifact of engineering. Executable artifacts are derived from C and kept in correspondence via synchronization operators Phi (realize) and Psi (rehydrate). Evidence links directly to structural claims in C, making every commitment auditable and under-specification explicit as measurable consensus entropy rather than a silent guess. Evaluation must move beyond code correctness toward alignment fidelity, consensus entropy, and intervention distance. We propose benchmark task families designed to measure whether consensus-based workflows reduce human intervention compared to chat-driven baselines.
title_zh: 扩展人机协作编程需要一个可管理的共识层
abstract_zh: Vibe coding 能够快速生成正确且可执行的代码，但无法留下任何关于结构承诺、依赖关系或其背后依据的记录。评审者无法判断系统假设了哪些不变量、发生了哪些变化，以及为何出现回归问题。这并非生成能力的失败，而是一次控制机制的失效：当前 AI 辅助开发的主要产物（代码加聊天记录）导致了维度坍缩，将复杂的系统拓扑结构压缩为低维文本，使系统在变更下变得不透明且脆弱。我们提出“代理共识”（Agentic Consensus）范式：以共识层 C 作为工程的核心产物，C 是一个可操作的世界模型，以带类型的属性图形式表示，取代代码成为主要的工程资产。可执行的产物通过同步算子 Φ（实现）和 Ψ（重激活）从 C 中导出，并保持与 C 的一致性。证据直接关联到 C 中的结构声明，使得每一项承诺都可审计，而原本隐含的不确定性则被显式表达为可度量的共识熵，而非无声的猜测。评估标准必须超越代码正确性，转向对齐保真度、共识熵以及干预距离等指标。我们提出了基准任务族，旨在衡量基于共识的工作流相较于传统聊天驱动基线，是否能显著减少人工干预。

title: GraSP: Graph-Structured Skill Compositions for LLM Agents
authors: Tianle Xia, Lingxiang Hu, Yiding Sun, Ming Xu, Lan Xu, Siying Wang, Wei Xu, Jie Jiang
abstract: Skill ecosystems for LLM agents have matured rapidly, yet recent benchmarks show that providing agents with more skills does not monotonically improve performance -- focused sets of 2-3 skills outperform comprehensive documentation, and excessive skills actually hurt. The bottleneck has shifted from skill availability to skill orchestration: agents need not more skills, but a structural mechanism to select, compose, and execute them with explicit causal dependencies. We propose GraSP, the first executable skill graph architecture that introduces a compilation layer between skill retrieval and execution. GraSP transforms flat skill sets into typed directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) with precondition-effect edges, executes them with node-level verification, and performs locality-bounded repair through five typed operators -- reducing replanning from O(N) to O(d^h). Across ALFWorld, ScienceWorld, WebShop, and InterCode with eight LLM backbones, GraSP outperforms ReAct, Reflexion, ExpeL, and flat skill baselines in every configuration, improving reward by up to +19 points over the strongest baseline while cutting environment steps by up to 41%. GraSP's advantage grows with task complexity and is robust to both skill over-retrieval and quality degradation, confirming that structured orchestration -- not larger skill libraries -- is the key to reliable agent execution.
title_zh: GraSP：面向大语言模型智能体的图结构技能组合
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）代理的技能生态系统已迅速成熟，但近期基准测试表明，为代理提供越多技能，并不意味着性能会单调提升——聚焦于2-3个核心技能的集合反而优于全面的文档化技能库，而过多的技能甚至会产生负面影响。瓶颈已从技能的可获得性转向技能的编排：代理并不需要更多技能，而是需要一种结构化机制，以明确的因果依赖关系来选择、组合并执行这些技能。我们提出了GraSP，这是首个可执行的技能图架构，其在技能检索与执行之间引入了编译层。GraSP将扁平的技能集合转化为带有前提-效果边的类型化有向无环图（DAG），通过节点级验证执行，并利用五种类型的算子实现局部范围内的修复，将重规划复杂度从O(N)降低至O(d^h)。在ALFWorld、ScienceWorld、WebShop和InterCode等多个任务场景中，采用八种不同的LLM骨干网络，GraSP在所有配置下均超越了ReAct、Reflexion、ExpeL以及传统的扁平技能基线方法，相比最强基线最高提升19分奖励，同时将环境步数减少高达41%。GraSP的优势随着任务复杂性的增加而愈发显著，且对技能过量检索和质量下降均表现出鲁棒性，证实了结构化编排——而非更大的技能库——才是实现可靠代理执行的关键所在。

title: M100: An Orchestrated Dataflow Architecture Powering General AI Computing
authors: Yan Xie, Changkui Mao, Changsong Wu, Chao Lu, Chao Suo, Cheng Qian, Chun Yang, Danyang Zhu, Hengchang Xiong, Hongzhan Lu, Hongzhen Liu, Jiafu Liu, Jie Chen, Jie Dai, Junfeng Tang, Kai Liu, Kun Li, Lipeng Ge, Meng Sun, Min Luo, Peng Chen, Peng Wang, Shaodong Yang, Shibin Tang, Shibo Chen, Weikang Zhang, Xiao Ling, Xiaobo Du, Xin Wu, Yang Liu, Yi Jiang, Yihua Jin, Yin Huang, Yuli Zhang, Zhen Yuan, Zhiyuan Man, Zhongxiao Yao
abstract: As deep learning-based AI technologies gain momentum, the demand for general-purpose AI computing architectures continues to grow. While GPGPU-based architectures offer versatility for diverse AI workloads, they often fall short in efficiency and cost-effectiveness. Various Domain-Specific Architectures (DSAs) excel at particular AI tasks but struggle to extend across broader applications or adapt to the rapidly evolving AI landscape. M100 is Li Auto's response: a performant, cost-effective architecture for AI inference in Autonomous Driving (AD), Large Language Models (LLMs), and intelligent human interactions, domains crucial to today's most competitive automobile platforms. M100 employs a dataflow parallel architecture, where compiler-architecture co-design orchestrates not only computation but, more critically, data movement across time and space. Leveraging dataflow computing efficiency, our hardware-software co-design improves system performance while reducing hardware complexity and cost. M100 largely eliminates caching: tensor computations are driven by compiler- and runtime-managed data streams flowing between computing elements and on/off-chip memories, yielding greater efficiency and scalability than cache-based systems. Another key principle was selecting the right operational granularity for scheduling, issuing, and execution across compiler, firmware, and hardware. Recognizing commonalities in AI workloads, we chose the tensor as the fundamental data element. M100 demonstrates general AI computing capability across diverse inference applications, including UniAD (for AD) and LLaMA (for LLMs). Benchmarks show M100 outperforms GPGPU architectures in AD applications with higher utilization, representing a promising direction for future general AI computing.
title_zh: M100：一种驱动通用人工智能计算的协同数据流架构
abstract_zh: 随着基于深度学习的人工智能技术不断发展，通用型人工智能计算架构的需求持续增长。尽管基于GPGPU的架构在应对多样化的AI工作负载方面具有灵活性，但其在效率和成本效益方面往往表现不足。而各类专用领域架构（DSAs）虽然在特定AI任务上表现出色，却难以扩展到更广泛的应用场景，也难以适应快速演进的人工智能发展态势。M100是理想汽车的回应：一种高性能、低成本的AI推理架构，适用于自动驾驶（AD）、大语言模型（LLMs）以及智能人机交互等关键领域，这些正是当今最具竞争力汽车平台的核心组成部分。M100采用数据流并行架构，通过编译器与硬件的协同设计，不仅协调计算过程，更关键的是实现了跨时间与空间的数据流动管理。借助数据流计算的高效性，我们的软硬件协同设计显著提升了系统性能，同时降低了硬件复杂度与成本。M100大幅减少了对缓存的依赖：张量计算由编译器和运行时共同管理的数据流驱动，数据在计算单元与片上/片外存储器之间流动，相比传统基于缓存的系统，展现出更高的效率与可扩展性。另一个核心原则是，在编译器、固件与硬件层面，选择合适的操作粒度以实现调度、分发与执行。鉴于AI工作负载之间的共性，我们选定“张量”作为基本数据单元。M100在多种推理应用中展现了通用AI计算能力，涵盖UniAD（用于自动驾驶）和LLaMA（用于大语言模型）。基准测试表明，M100在自动驾驶应用场景中相较GPGPU架构具有更高的利用率，展现出未来通用AI计算的一个极具前景的发展方向。

title: State Transfer Reveals Reuse in Controlled Routing
authors: Yanzhen Lu, Zhicheng Qian, Muchen Jiang, Xingyu Zhou
abstract: Prompt-based interventions can change model behavior, but trained success alone does not identify where the behaviorally relevant state is represented. We study this question in controlled routing tasks using interfaces chosen on support data, held-out query evaluation, and matched necessity, sufficiency, and wrong-interface controls. On GPT-2 triop, an early interface supports exact transfer under these tests. On GPT-2 add/sub, zero-retrain compiled transfer at the fixed interface recovers most of donor routing accuracy, while trainable prompt slots can relearn the same behavior at several other positions only after additional support examples and optimization. These results distinguish fixed-interface reuse from prompt relocation in a setting where the two can be tested directly. Qwen routing provides a cross-architecture consistency check for the same matched-interface pattern at the operator token, although donor-specific identity on the local V-path remains unresolved. Generation and reasoning branches are used to map scope: they show broader transport or weaker controller identifiability once control depends on longer trajectories or harder selection. In controlled routing, fixed-interface transfer is therefore stronger evidence of reuse than trained prompt success alone.
title_zh: 状态转移揭示了受控路由中的复用性
abstract_zh: 基于提示的干预可以改变模型的行为，但仅凭训练成功并不能确定行为相关状态的具体表征位置。我们通过受控路由任务研究这一问题，采用在支持数据上选择的接口，结合保留查询评估以及匹配的必要性、充分性和错误接口控制。在GPT-2 triop任务中，一个早期接口在这些测试下支持精确转移。而在GPT-2 add/sub任务中，固定接口上的零训练编译式转移恢复了大部分源模型的路由准确率；相比之下，可训练的提示槽只有在额外提供支持样本并进行优化后，才能在多个其他位置重新学习相同的行为。这些结果在可直接对比的条件下，区分了固定接口复用与提示位置重置的不同。Qwen的路由任务为同一匹配接口模式（位于操作符标记处）提供了跨架构的一致性验证，尽管局部V路径上的源模型特异性身份仍未能解决。生成与推理分支用于映射作用范围：当控制依赖于更长轨迹或更复杂的筛选时，它们显示出更广的传播范围或较弱的控制器可识别性。因此，在受控路由任务中，固定接口转移比单纯的训练提示成功提供了更强的复用证据。

title: When AI Models Become Dependencies: Studying the Evolution of Pre-Trained Model Reuse in Downstream Software Systems
authors: Peerachai Banyongrakkul, Mansooreh Zahedi, Christoph Treude, Haoyu Gao, Patanamon Thongtanunam
abstract: Modern software systems have transitioned from purely code-based architectures to AI-integrated systems where pre-trained models (PTMs) serve as permanent dependencies. However, while the evolution of traditional software libraries is well-documented, we lack a clear understanding of how these "PTM dependencies" change over time. Unlike libraries, PTMs are characterized by opaque internals and less standardized, rapidly evolving release cycles. Furthermore, their multi-role nature enables developers to treat individual instances of a single PTM as separate functional dependencies based on their specific downstream tasks. This raises a critical question for software maintenance: do PTMs change like standard software libraries or do they follow a divergent pattern? To answer this, we present the first empirical study of downstream PTM changes, analyzing a comprehensive dataset of 4,988 releases across 323 GitHub OSS repositories that reuse open-source PTMs. Using traditional software libraries as a baseline, we find that PTMs follow a qualitatively distinct pattern. PTMs are typically added late in the project life-cycle and tend to accumulate rather than be replaced as a project matures. Our findings show that PTM changes are three times less frequent (406 of 2,814 release transitions) than library changes. PTM changes are also less routinely documented, but more likely to carry explicit rationale. Unlike libraries, which evolve reactively, PTM evolution is proactively driven by capability expansion, with a unique documented rationale of PTM testing uncertainty. Our work calls for a rethinking of how PTMs are tracked and managed as dependencies in modern software engineering.
title_zh: 当AI模型成为依赖项：研究预训练模型在下游软件系统中的复用演变
abstract_zh: 现代软件系统已从纯代码架构演变为集成人工智能的系统，其中预训练模型（PTMs）作为永久依赖项存在。然而，尽管传统软件库的演化过程已有充分研究，我们对这些“PTM依赖项”随时间如何变化仍缺乏清晰理解。与软件库不同，PTMs 具有不透明的内部结构，且其发布周期更不规范、更新迅速。此外，由于其多功能特性，开发者可根据具体下游任务，将同一 PTM 的不同实例视为独立的功能依赖。这引发了一个关键的软件维护问题：PTMs 的演化是类似于标准软件库，还是遵循一种截然不同的模式？为回答这一问题，我们开展了首个关于下游 PTM 变化的实证研究，分析了涵盖 323 个 GitHub 开源项目、共计 4,988 次版本发布的综合性数据集。以传统软件库为基准进行对比，我们发现 PTMs 遵循一种定性上截然不同的演化模式。PTMs 通常在项目生命周期后期才被引入，并随着项目成熟而不断累积，而非被替换。研究结果表明，PTM 的变更频率仅为软件库变更的三分之一（2,814 次版本迭代中仅 406 次发生 PTM 变更）。同时，PTM 的变更也较少被常规记录，但更可能附带明确的理由说明。与反应式演化的软件库不同，PTM 的演化是主动驱动的，主要源于功能能力的扩展，其特有的、被明确记录的动机是“PTM 测试不确定性”。我们的工作呼吁重新思考现代软件工程中对 PTMs 作为依赖项的追踪与管理方式。

title: Revisiting Code Debloating with Ground Truth-based Evaluation
authors: Muhammad Bilal, Moiz Ali, Mohit Kumar, Fareed Zaffar, Fahad Shaon, Ashish Gehani, Sazzadur Rahaman
abstract: Program debloating aims to remove unused code to reduce performance overhead, attack surfaces, and maintenance costs. Over time, debloating has evolved across multiple layers (container, library, and application), each building on the principles of application-level debloating. Despite its central role, application-level debloating continues to rely on imperfect proxies for measuring performance, such as test-case-driven evaluation for correctness, code size for runtime efficiency, and gadget count reduction for estimating security posture. While there is widespread skepticism about using such imperfect proxies, the community still lacks standardized methodologies or benchmarks to assess the true performance of application-level software debloating. This experience paper aims to address the gap. We revisit the foundations of application-level debloating through a ground-truth-based evaluation paradigm. Our analysis of eight state-of-the-art debloaters - Blade, Chisel, Cov, CovA, Lmcas, Trimmer, Occam, and Razor - uncovers insights previously unattainable through traditional evaluations. These tools collectively span the spectrum of source-to-source, IR-to-IR, and binary-to-binary transformation paradigms, characterizing a holistic reassessment across abstraction levels. Our analysis reveals that while dynamic analysis-based tools often remove up to 94% of code that should be retained, static analysis-based approaches exhibit the opposite behavior, showing high false retention rates due to coarse-grained dependency over-approximation. Additionally, static analyses may add code by introducing specialized variants of functions. False retentions and removals not only cause functional incorrectness but may also lead to systematic inconsistency, robustness failures, and exploitable vulnerabilities.
title_zh: 基于真实数据的评估重新审视代码瘦身
abstract_zh: 程序去冗化旨在移除未使用代码，以降低性能开销、攻击面和维护成本。随着时间推移，去冗化技术已逐步扩展至多个层次（容器、库和应用层），每一层次均建立在应用级去冗化的基础之上。尽管应用级去冗化在整体架构中占据核心地位，但其评估仍依赖于不完善的代理指标：以测试用例驱动的评估来衡量正确性，以代码大小衡量运行时效率，以“小工具”数量减少来估算安全状态。尽管学术界对这些不完善代理指标普遍持怀疑态度，但目前社区仍缺乏标准化的方法或基准来真实评估应用级软件去冗化的实际效果。本文旨在填补这一空白。我们通过基于真实情况的评估范式，重新审视应用级去冗化的根本原则。通过对八种前沿去冗化工具——Blade、Chisel、Cov、CovA、Lmcas、Trimmer、Occam 和 Razor 的分析，揭示了以往传统评估手段无法获得的新见解。这些工具涵盖了从源码到源码、中间表示（IR）到IR，以及二进制到二进制的多种转换范式，全面覆盖了不同抽象层级的去冗化实践。我们的分析发现，基于动态分析的工具往往错误地移除了高达94%本应保留的代码；而基于静态分析的方法则表现出相反的问题，由于依赖关系的粗粒度过度近似，导致大量虚假保留现象。此外，静态分析方法还可能通过引入函数的特殊变体而增加代码量。虚假保留与错误删除不仅会导致功能错误，还可能引发系统性不一致、鲁棒性失效，甚至产生可被利用的安全漏洞。

title: Too Correct to Learn: Reinforcement Learning on Saturated Reasoning Data
authors: Zhenwen Liang, Yujun Zhou, Sidi Lu, Xiangliang Zhang, Haitao Mi, Dong Yu
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) enhances LLM reasoning, yet a paradox emerges as models scale: strong base models saturate standard benchmarks (e.g., MATH), yielding correct but homogeneous solutions. In such environments, the lack of failure cases causes the advantage signal in group-relative algorithms (e.g., GRPO) to vanish, driving policies into mode collapse. To address this, we propose Constrained Uniform Top-K Sampling (CUTS), a parameter-free decoding strategy enforcing structure-preserving exploration. Unlike standard sampling that follows model biases, CUTS flattens the local optimization landscape by sampling uniformly from constrained high-confidence candidates. We integrate this into Mixed-CUTS, a training framework synergizing exploitative and exploratory rollouts to amplify intra-group advantage variance. Experiments on Qwen3 models demonstrate that our approach prevents policy degeneration and significantly boosts out-of-domain generalization. Notably, Mixed-CUTS improves Pass@1 accuracy on the challenging AIME25 benchmark by up to 15.1% over standard GRPO, validating that maintaining diversity within the semantic manifold is critical for rigorous reasoning.
title_zh: 过于正确以至无法学习：在饱和推理数据上的强化学习
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）能够提升大语言模型（LLM）的推理能力，但随着模型规模的增大，一个悖论逐渐显现：强大的基础模型在标准基准测试（如MATH）上已趋于饱和，导致生成的答案虽然正确，却高度同质化。在这种环境下，由于缺乏失败案例，群体相对类算法（如GRPO）中的优势信号会消失，从而引发策略模式崩溃。为解决这一问题，我们提出了一种无参数的解码策略——受限均匀Top-K采样（CUTS），该策略通过保持结构的探索性来实现有效探索。与遵循模型偏见的标准采样不同，CUTS通过从受约束的高置信度候选集中进行均匀采样，使局部优化景观趋于平坦。我们将该策略融入Mixed-CUTS训练框架中，该框架结合了利用性与探索性轨迹，以增强组内优势的方差。在Qwen3模型上的实验表明，我们的方法有效防止了策略退化，并显著提升了跨领域泛化能力。值得注意的是，相较于标准的GRPO方法，Mixed-CUTS在具有挑战性的AIME25基准测试中将Pass@1准确率最高提升了15.1%，验证了在语义流形内部保持多样性对于严谨推理至关重要。

title: StepPO: Step-Aligned Policy Optimization for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
authors: Daoyu Wang, Qingchuan Li, Mingyue Cheng, Jie Ouyang, Shuo Yu, Qi Liu, Enhong Chen
abstract: General agents have given rise to phenomenal applications such as OpenClaw and Claude Code. As these agent systems (a.k.a. Harnesses) strive for bolder goals, they demand increasingly stronger agentic capabilities from foundation Large Language Models (LLMs). Agentic Reinforcement Learning (RL) is emerging as a central post-training paradigm for empowering LLMs with these capabilities and is playing an increasingly pivotal role in agent training. Unlike single-turn token-level alignment or reasoning enhancement, as in RLHF and RLVR, Agentic RL targets multi-turn interactive settings, where the goal is to optimize core agentic capabilities such as decision making and tool use while addressing new challenges including delayed and sparse rewards, as well as long and variable context. As a result, the token-centric modeling and optimization paradigm inherited from traditional LLM RL is becoming increasingly inadequate for capturing real LLM agent behavior.
