abstract: Large language models (LLMs) using chain-of-thought reasoning often waste substantial compute by producing long, incorrect responses. Abstention can mitigate this by withholding outputs unlikely to be correct. While most abstention methods decide to withhold outputs before or after generation, dynamic mid-generation abstention considers early termination of unpromising reasoning traces at each token position. Prior work has explored empirical variants of this idea, but principled guidance for the abstention rule remains lacking. We present a formal analysis of dynamic abstention for LLMs, modeling abstention as an explicit action within a regularized reinforcement learning framework. An abstention reward parameter controls the trade-off between compute and information. We show that abstaining when the value function falls below this reward strictly outperforms natural baselines under general conditions. We further derive a principled and efficient method to approximate the value function. Empirical results on mathematical reasoning and toxicity avoidance tasks support our theory and demonstrate improved selective accuracy over existing methods.
title_zh: 知道何时放弃：大语言模型推理中动态回避的原理性框架
abstract_zh: 使用思维链推理的大语言模型（LLMs）常常因生成冗长且错误的回答而浪费大量计算资源。通过放弃生成那些不太可能正确的输出，可以缓解这一问题。尽管大多数放弃策略在生成之前或之后决定是否放弃输出，但动态的中途放弃则在每个标记位置考虑提前终止前景不佳的推理路径。以往的研究探索了该思想的多种经验性变体，但缺乏对放弃规则的系统性指导。本文提出了对大语言模型动态放弃行为的正式分析，将放弃建模为正则化强化学习框架中的显式动作。一个放弃奖励参数控制着计算开销与信息获取之间的权衡。我们证明，在价值函数低于该奖励阈值时选择放弃，严格优于一般条件下的自然基线方法。此外，我们推导出一种原理清晰且高效的近似价值函数的方法。在数学推理和毒性规避任务上的实证结果验证了我们的理论，并展示了相较于现有方法更高的选择性准确率。

title: Capturing Monetarily Exploitable Vulnerability in Smart Contracts via Auditor Knowledge-Learning Fuzzing
authors: Bowen Cai, Weiheng Bai, Hangyun Tang, Youshui Lu, Kangjie Lu
abstract: Smart contracts extended blockchain functionality beyond simple transactions, powering complex applications like decentralized finance (DeFi). However, this complexity introduces serious security challenges, including price manipulation and inflation attacks. Despite the development of various security tools, the rapid rise in financially motivated exploits continues to pose a significant threat to the blockchain ecosystem. These financially motivated exploits often stem from Monetarily Exploitable Vulnerabilities (MEVuls), which refer to vulnerabilities arising from exploitable implementations in monetary transactions or value-transfer logic. Due to their complexity, intricate chains of function calls, multifaceted logic, and diverse manifestations across different smart contracts, MEVuls are particularly challenging for current security tools to identify. Instead of providing actionable insights, existing tools frequently generate excessive warnings that overwhelm developers without effectively mitigating risks. To address the challenge of recognizing MEVuls, we first formalize MEVuls based on common real-world financial exploits. Then, we introduce FAUDITOR, a specialized fuzzer designed to detect MEVuls in smart contracts. The key insight is that leveraging smart contracts' finance-related interfaces directly exposes critical vulnerabilities, making detection more targeted. We further integrate auditors' reports using NLP to extract valuable insights on exploitation patterns, enabling a more informed search strategy. Additionally, FAUDITOR employs a self-learning mechanism that refines its detection strategies over time, allowing it to improve based on prior fuzzing results. In our evaluation, FAUDITOR impressively reveals 220 zero-day MEVuls. Meanwhile, compared to existing fuzzers, FAUDITOR detects vulnerabilities faster and achieves better instruction coverage.
title_zh: 通过审计员知识学习模糊测试捕获智能合约中的可货币化漏洞
abstract_zh:
智能合约将区块链的功能从简单的交易扩展到了复杂的应用，如去中心化金融（DeFi）。然而，这种复杂性也带来了严重的安全挑战，包括价格操纵和通货膨胀攻击等问题。尽管已开发出多种安全工具，但由经济动机驱动的漏洞利用事件仍以惊人的速度增长，持续对区块链生态系统构成重大威胁。这些经济驱动型攻击大多源于“可货币化漏洞”（Monetarily Exploitable Vulnerabilities, MEVuls），即由于货币交易或价值转移逻辑中存在可被利用的实现缺陷而引发的安全漏洞。由于其高度复杂性、错综复杂的函数调用链、多层面的业务逻辑以及在不同智能合约中多样化的表现形式，MEVuls 对现有安全工具而言尤其难以识别。现有的工具往往无法提供切实可行的修复建议，反而产生大量误报，使开发者应接不暇，未能有效降低风险。

为应对识别MEVuls的挑战，我们首先基于现实世界中的典型金融攻击案例，对MEVuls进行了形式化定义。随后，我们提出FAUDITOR——一种专门针对智能合约中MEVuls设计的新型模糊测试工具。其核心洞察在于：直接利用智能合约中的金融相关接口，能够更有效地暴露关键漏洞，从而实现更具针对性的检测。此外，我们通过自然语言处理（NLP）技术整合审计报告，提取出有关攻击模式的宝贵信息，进而优化搜索策略，提升检测效率。同时，FAUDITOR具备自学习机制，能够根据以往模糊测试的结果不断优化自身的检测策略，实现持续进化。

在实际评估中，FAUDITOR成功揭示了220个此前未知的零日MEVuls。与现有模糊测试工具相比，FAUDITOR不仅在漏洞发现速度上表现更优，还实现了更高的指令覆盖率，显著提升了智能合约安全检测的效率与深度。

title: OpenGame: Open Agentic Coding for Games
authors: Yilei Jiang, Jinyuan Hu, Qianyin Xiao, Yaozhi Zheng, Ruize Ma, Kaituo Feng, Jiaming Han, Tianshuo Peng, Kaixuan Fan, Manyuan Zhang, Xiangyu Yue
abstract: Game development sits at the intersection of creative design and intricate software engineering, demanding the joint orchestration of game engines, real-time loops, and tightly coupled state across many files. While Large Language Models (LLMs) and code agents now solve isolated programming tasks with ease, they consistently stumble when asked to produce a fully playable game from a high-level design, collapsing under cross-file inconsistencies, broken scene wiring, and logical incoherence. We bridge this gap with OpenGame, the first open-source agentic framework explicitly designed for end-to-end web game creation. At its core lies Game Skill, a reusable, evolving capability composed of a Template Skill that grows a library of project skeletons from experience and a Debug Skill that maintains a living protocol of verified fixes - together enabling the agent to scaffold stable architectures and systematically repair integration errors rather than patch isolated syntax bugs. Powering this framework is GameCoder-27B, a code LLM specialized for game engine mastery through a three-stage pipeline of continual pre-training, supervised fine-tuning, and execution-grounded reinforcement learning. Since verifying interactive playability is fundamentally harder than checking static code, we further introduce OpenGame-Bench, an evaluation pipeline that scores agentic game generation along Build Health, Visual Usability, and Intent Alignment via headless browser execution and VLM judging. Across 150 diverse game prompts, OpenGame establishes a new state-of-the-art. We hope OpenGame pushes code agents beyond discrete software engineering problems and toward building complex, interactive real-world applications. Our framework will be fully open-sourced.
title_zh: OpenGame：面向游戏的开放智能编码
abstract_zh:
游戏开发处于创意设计与复杂软件工程的交汇点，需要对游戏引擎、实时循环以及跨多个文件的紧密耦合状态进行协同管理。尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）和代码智能体如今已能轻松完成孤立的编程任务，但当被要求从高层次设计生成一个可完整运行的游戏时，它们往往力不从心——常常因跨文件不一致、场景连接断裂以及逻辑矛盾而崩溃。为此，我们推出了 OpenGame，这是首个专为端到端网页游戏创建而设计的开源智能体框架。其核心是“游戏技能”（Game Skill），一种可复用且持续进化的通用能力：它由“模板技能”（Template Skill）和“调试技能”（Debug Skill）共同构成——前者通过经验积累不断扩充项目骨架库，后者则维护一套经过验证的修复协议，形成动态更新的解决方案知识库。这一组合使智能体不仅能搭建稳定的架构，还能系统性地修复集成错误，而非仅修补孤立的语法问题。

支撑该框架的是 GameCoder-27B，一款专注于游戏引擎精通的代码大模型，其训练采用三阶段流水线：持续预训练、监督微调与基于执行反馈的强化学习。由于验证交互式可玩性远比静态代码检查更具挑战性，我们进一步提出了 OpenGame-Bench 评估体系，通过无头浏览器执行与视觉语言模型（VLM）判断，从构建健康度、视觉可用性和意图一致性三个维度对智能体生成游戏的表现进行评分。

在150个多样化的游戏提示测试中，OpenGame 首次达到新的行业领先水平。我们期望 OpenGame 能推动代码智能体超越单一软件工程问题，迈向构建复杂、交互性强的真实世界应用的新阶段。我们的框架将全面开源。

title: Understanding the Prompt Sensitivity
authors: Yang Liu, Chenhui Chu
abstract: Prompt sensitivity, which refers to how strongly the output of a large language model (LLM) depends on the exact wording of its input prompt, raises concerns among users about the LLM's stability and reliability. In this work, we consider LLMs as multivariate functions and perform a first-order Taylor expansion, thereby analyzing the relationship between meaning-preserving prompts, their gradients, and the log probabilities of the model's next token. We derive an upper bound on the difference between log probabilities using the Cauchy-Schwarz inequality. We show that LLMs do not internally cluster similar inputs like smaller neural networks do, but instead disperse them. This dispersing behavior leads to an excessively high upper bound on the difference of log probabilities between two meaning-preserving prompts, making it difficult to effectively reduce to 0. In our analysis, we also show which types of meaning-preserving prompt variants are more likely to introduce prompt sensitivity risks in LLMs. In addition, we demonstrate that the upper bound is strongly correlated with an existing prompt sensitivity metric, PromptSensiScore. Moreover, by analyzing the logit variance, we find that prompt templates typically exert a greater influence on logits than the questions themselves. Overall, our results provide a general interpretation for why current LLMs can be highly sensitive to prompts with the same meaning, offering crucial evidence for understanding the prompt sensitivity of LLMs. Code for experiments is available at https://github.com/ku-nlp/Understanding_the_Prompt_Sensitivity.
title_zh: 理解提示敏感性
abstract_zh: 提示敏感性，即大型语言模型（LLM）的输出对输入提示语精确措辞的依赖程度，引发了用户对模型稳定性与可靠性的担忧。在本研究中，我们将LLM视为多变量函数，并进行一阶泰勒展开，从而分析语义保持提示、其梯度与模型下一个词元的对数概率之间的关系。我们利用柯西-施瓦茨不等式推导出对数概率差异的上界。研究发现，LLM并不会像小型神经网络那样在内部对相似输入进行聚类，而是将其分散分布。这种分散行为导致两个语义保持提示之间的对数概率差异的上界过高，难以有效降低至0。我们的分析还表明，某些类型的语义保持提示变体更可能引入提示敏感性风险。此外，我们证明该上界与现有的提示敏感性度量指标——PromptSensiScore——具有强相关性。通过分析logits方差，我们进一步发现，提示模板通常比问题本身对logits产生更大的影响。总体而言，本研究为当前LLM对语义相同但表述不同的提示表现出高度敏感性提供了普遍解释，为深入理解LLM的提示敏感性提供了关键证据。实验代码已公开于 https://github.com/ku-nlp/Understanding_the_Prompt_Sensitivity。

title: Reliability of AI Bots Footprints in GitHub Actions CI/CD Workflows
authors: Syed Muhammad Ashhar Shah, Sehrish Habib, Muizz Hussain, Maryam Abdul Ghafoor, Abdul Ali Bangash
abstract: Continuous Integration and Deployment (CI/CD) workflows are central to modern software delivery, yet the reliability of agentic AI bots operating within these workflows remain underexplored. Using pull requests (PRs), commits, and repositories from the AIDev dataset, we retrieved associated CI/CD workflow runs via the GitHub Actions API and analyzed 61,837 runs from 2,355 repositories, all triggered by PRs generated by five AI bots: Claude, Devin, Cursor, Copilot, and Codex. We observed substantial agent-dependent differences in workflow reliability, with Copilot and Codex achieving the highest success rates ~93% and ~94% respectively. At the repository level, we find a negative correlation between AI agent contribution frequency and workflow success rate, suggesting that a higher frequency of Agentic PRs may hinder CI/CD workflow reliability. We defined a taxonomy of 13 categories against 3,067 agentic PRs whose associated workflows failed, and observed a trend analysis that indicates visually observable shifts from functional to non-functional PR categories over time, although these trends are not statistically significant. Our findings motivate the need for actionable guidance on integrating AI agents into CI/CD workflows and prioritizing safeguards in workflows where failures are most likely to occur.
title_zh: AI机器人在GitHub Actions CI/CD工作流中的可靠性分析
abstract_zh: 持续集成与部署（CI/CD）工作流是现代软件交付的核心，然而在这些工作流中运行的智能代理型AI机器人（agentic AI bots）的可靠性仍缺乏深入研究。基于AIDev数据集中的拉取请求（PR）、提交记录及代码仓库信息，我们通过GitHub Actions API检索了相关CI/CD工作流的执行记录，并分析了来自2,355个仓库的61,837次工作流运行，这些运行均由五种AI代理（Claude、Devin、Cursor、Copilot和Codex）生成的PR触发。研究发现，不同AI代理在工作流可靠性方面存在显著差异：Copilot和Codex分别达到了约93%和约94%的最高成功率。在仓库层面，我们观察到AI代理贡献频率与工作流成功概率之间存在负相关关系，表明频繁使用智能代理生成的PR可能对CI/CD工作流的稳定性产生负面影响。我们针对3,067个导致工作流失败的智能代理PR构建了一个包含13个类别的分类体系，并进行了趋势分析，结果显示从功能型到非功能型PR类别的分布随时间呈现可视觉识别的变化趋势，尽管这些变化在统计上并不显著。我们的研究结果凸显了制定切实可行的指导策略以将AI代理有效整合进CI/CD流程的必要性，并强调应在故障最可能发生的工作流环节优先部署相应的防护机制。

title: LeGo-Code: Can Modular Curriculum Learning Advance Complex Code Generation? Insights from Text-to-SQL
authors: Salmane Chafik, Saad Ezzini, Ismail Berrada
abstract: Recently, code-oriented large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in translating natural language into executable code. Text-to-SQL is a significant application of this ability, enabling non-technical users to interact with relational databases using natural language. However, state-of-the-art models continue to struggle with highly complex logic, particularly deeply nested statements involving multiple joins and conditions, as well as with real-world database schemas that are noisy or poorly structured. In this paper, we investigate whether curriculum learning can improve the performance of code-based LLMs on Text-to-SQL tasks. Employing benchmarks including Spider and BIRD, we fine-tune models under different curriculum strategies. Our experiments show that naive curriculum, simply ordering training samples by complexity in a single epoch, fails to surpass standard fine-tuning due to catastrophic forgetting. To overcome this, we propose a Modular Adapter Composition (MAC) strategy. By sequentially training tier-specific adapters on incremental complexity levels (Easy to Extra-Hard), we create a scaffolded learning environment that improves performance on complex queries. Our approach not only produces measurable performance gains on the Spider and BIRD benchmarks but also provides a flexible, "Lego-like" architecture, allowing models to be composed and deployed based on specific schema difficulty requirements. These findings demonstrate that structured, modular learning is a superior alternative to monolithic fine-tuning for mastering the syntax and logic of complex code generation.
title_zh: LeGo-Code：模块化课程学习能否推动复杂代码生成？来自文本到SQL的洞察
abstract_zh: 近年来，以代码为导向的大语言模型（LLMs）在将自然语言转换为可执行代码方面展现出强大的能力。文本到SQL（Text-to-SQL）是这一能力的重要应用，使非技术用户能够通过自然语言与关系型数据库进行交互。然而，当前最先进的模型在处理高度复杂的逻辑时仍面临挑战，尤其是在涉及多重连接和复杂条件的深层嵌套语句方面，同时对现实世界中噪声较多或结构不佳的数据库模式也表现欠佳。本文探讨了课程学习（curriculum learning）是否能够提升基于代码的LLM在Text-to-SQL任务上的表现。我们采用Spider和BIRD等基准数据集，在不同课程学习策略下对模型进行微调。实验结果表明，简单的课程学习方法——即在一个训练周期内仅按复杂度对训练样本进行排序——由于出现灾难性遗忘，无法超越标准微调的效果。为此，我们提出一种模块化适配器组合（Modular Adapter Composition, MAC）策略：通过在逐步增加复杂度的层级（从简单到超难）上依次训练特定层级的适配器，构建一个分层递进的学习环境，从而显著提升模型对复杂查询的处理能力。我们的方法不仅在Spider和BIRD基准测试中带来了可量化的性能提升，还提供了一种灵活、类似乐高积木的架构设计，使模型可根据特定数据库模式的难度需求进行组合与部署。这些发现表明，结构化、模块化的学习方式相较于单一的整体微调，更适用于掌握复杂代码生成中的语法与逻辑。

title: WebCompass: Towards Multimodal Web Coding Evaluation for Code Language Models
authors: Xinping Lei, Xinyu Che, Junqi Xiong, Chenchen Zhang, Yukai Huang, Chenyu Zhou, Haoyang Huang, Minghao Liu, Letian Zhu, Hongyi Ye, Jinhua Hao, Ken Deng, Zizheng Zhan, Han Li, Dailin Li, Yifan Yao, Ming Sun, Zhaoxiang Zhang, Jiaheng Liu
abstract: Large language models are rapidly evolving into interactive coding agents capable of end-to-end web coding, yet existing benchmarks evaluate only narrow slices of this capability, typically text-conditioned generation with static-correctness metrics, leaving visual fidelity, interaction quality, and codebase-level reasoning largely unmeasured. We introduce WebCompass, a multimodal benchmark that provides unified lifecycle evaluation of web engineering capability. Recognizing that real-world web coding is an iterative cycle of generation, editing, and repair, WebCompass spans three input modalities (text, image, video) and three task types (generation, editing, repair), yielding seven task categories that mirror professional workflows. Through a multi-stage, human-in-the-loop pipeline, we curate instances covering 15 generation domains, 16 editing operation types, and 11 repair defect types, each annotated at Easy/Medium/Hard levels. For evaluation, we adopt a checklist-guided LLM-as-a-Judge protocol for editing and repair, and propose a novel Agent-as-a-Judge paradigm for generation that autonomously executes generated websites in a real browser, explores interactive behaviors via the Model Context Protocol (MCP), and iteratively synthesizes targeted test cases, closely approximating human acceptance testing. We evaluate representative closed-source and open-source models and observe that: (1) closed-source models remain substantially stronger and more balanced; (2) editing and repair exhibit distinct difficulty profiles, with repair preserving interactivity better but remaining execution-challenging; (3) aesthetics is the most persistent bottleneck, especially for open-source models; and (4) framework choice materially affects outcomes, with Vue consistently challenging while React and Vanilla/HTML perform more strongly depending on task type.
title_zh: WebCompass：面向代码语言模型的多模态网络编码评估
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型正迅速演变为能够实现端到端网页开发的交互式编程代理，然而现有的评估基准仅衡量这一能力的狭窄方面，通常局限于以文本为条件生成内容，并采用静态正确性指标，导致视觉保真度、交互质量以及代码库层面的推理能力在很大程度上未被测量。为此，我们提出了 WebCompass——一个统一的多模态基准，用于对网页工程能力进行全生命周期评估。考虑到真实世界中的网页开发本质上是一个生成、编辑与修复的迭代循环，WebCompass 涵盖三种输入模态（文本、图像、视频）和三种任务类型（生成、编辑、修复），共形成七个任务类别，精准映射专业工作流程。通过一个多阶段、人机协同的流程，我们精心构建了涵盖15个生成领域、16种编辑操作类型和11类修复缺陷的实例，每类均按易/中/难三个难度级别标注。在评估方面，我们采用基于检查清单的“大模型作为裁判”协议来评估编辑与修复任务；同时提出一种创新的“代理作为裁判”范式用于生成任务，该范式能自主在真实浏览器中执行生成的网站，通过模型上下文协议（MCP）探索其交互行为，并迭代合成针对性测试用例，高度逼近人类验收测试过程。我们对代表性闭源与开源模型进行了评估，发现：（1）闭源模型仍显著更强且表现更均衡；（2）编辑与修复任务呈现出截然不同的难度特征，其中修复任务在保持交互性方面表现更好，但执行挑战依然突出；（3）美学表现是持续存在的瓶颈，尤其对开源模型而言更为明显；（4）框架选择对结果有实质性影响，Vue 始终构成较大挑战，而 React 与 Vanilla/HTML 在不同任务类型下表现更优。

title: Copy-as-Decode: Grammar-Constrained Parallel Prefill for LLM Editing
authors: Ziyang Liu
abstract: LLMs edit text and code by autoregressively regenerating the full output, even when most tokens appear verbatim in the input. We study Copy-as-Decode, a decoding-layer mechanism that recasts edit generation as structured decoding over a two-primitive grammar: <copy lines="i-j"/> references an input line range, <gen>...</gen> emits new content. A token-level FSM guarantees syntactic validity, and a serving-layer primitive updates the KV cache for each copy span via a single parallel-prefill forward rather than $N$ autoregressive steps -- sharing the parallel-forward kernel of speculative decoding but with input tokens as the draft and program-enforced acceptance replacing probabilistic verification. We report an upper-bound analysis that requires no end-to-end training. (i) Kernel speedup: on Qwen2.5-{1.5B, 7B}, copying $N$ tokens via parallel prefill is $6.8\times$--$303\times$ faster than autoregressive ($N \in [8, 512]$, A100 80GB bf16). (ii) Copy ceiling: on ProbeEdit and HumanEvalPack-Fix (Py/JS), $74$--$98\%$ of gold tokens are reachable under the line-level primitive; composed with the empirical kernel over each corpus's span histogram this yields a closed-form wall-clock bound of $29.0\times / 3.4\times / 4.2\times$ ($13.0\times$ pooled). A token-level extension reaches $91$--$99\%$ coverage with $4.5\times$--$6.5\times$ floors. (iii) Pipeline losslessness: oracle programs round-trip through the deterministic resolver on all $482$ cases, localizing any downstream failure to span selection rather than the mechanism. A perturbation study shows pooled EM drops from $100\%$ to $15.48\%$ under off-by-one noise. A fine-tuning pilot on Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B lifts HEvalFix-Py EM from $0/33$ (untrained) to $12$--$17\%$, a learnability signal, not a production selector. Batched-serving integration and multi-file coverage are scoped as follow-up.
title_zh: 复制即解码：用于大语言模型编辑的语法约束并行预填充
abstract_zh:
LLMs 通过自回归地重新生成完整输出来编辑文本和代码，即使大多数标记在输入中保持不变。我们研究了“复制即解码”（Copy-as-Decode）这一解码层机制，该机制将编辑生成重构为基于双原语语法的结构化解码：`<copy lines="i-j"/>` 引用输入行范围，`<gen>...</gen>` 输出新内容。一个词级别有限状态机（FSM）确保语法正确性，而服务层原语则通过单次并行预填充前向传播，而非 $N$ 步自回归过程，对每个复制段更新 KV 缓存——这共享了推测解码的并行前向核，但以输入 token 作为草稿，程序强制接受替代概率验证。我们报告了一项无需端到端训练的上限分析：  
(i) 核心加速：在 Qwen2.5-{1.5B, 7B} 模型上，通过并行预填充复制 $N$ 个 token 的速度比自回归方式快 $6.8\times$ 至 $303\times$（$N \in [8, 512]$，A100 80GB bf16）；  
(ii) 复制上限：在 ProbeEdit 和 HumanEvalPack-Fix（Py/JS）数据集上，基于行级原语可触及 $74\%$–$98\%$ 的真实 token；结合各语料库跨度直方图的经验核，得出闭式时钟时间上限分别为 $29.0\times / 3.4\times / 4.2\times$（合并后 $13.0\times$）；词级别扩展进一步提升覆盖至 $91\%$–$99\%$，且最低提速达 $4.5\times$–$6.5\times$；  
(iii) 流水线无损性：在全部 482 个案例中，原始程序经确定性解析器往返均能正确还原，任何下游失败仅源于片段选择问题，而非机制本身。扰动实验显示，引入“偏移一”的噪声后，合并 EM 分数从 $100\%$ 降至 $15.48\%$。对 Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B 的微调初步实验表明，HEvalFix-Py 的 EM 值从未训练时的 $0/33$ 提升至 $12$–$17\%$，显示出可学习信号，而非生产级选择器。后续工作将涵盖批处理服务集成与多文件覆盖能力。

title: Architectural Design Decisions in AI Agent Harnesses
authors: Hu Wei
abstract: AI agent systems increasingly rely on reusable non-LLM engineering infrastructure that packages tool mediation, context handling, delegation, safety control, and orchestration. Yet the architectural design decisions in this surrounding infrastructure remain understudied. This paper presents a protocol-guided, source-grounded empirical study of 70 publicly available agent-system projects, addressing three questions: which design-decision dimensions recur across projects, which co-occurrences structure those decisions, and which typical architectural patterns emerge. Methodologically, we contribute a transparent investigation procedure for analyzing heterogeneous agent-system corpora through source-code and technical-material reading. Empirically, we identify five recurring design dimensions (subagent architecture, context management, tool systems, safety mechanisms, and orchestration) and find that the corpus favors file-persistent, hybrid, and hierarchical context strategies; registry-oriented tool systems remain dominant while MCP- and plugin-oriented extensions are emerging; and intermediate isolation is common but high-assurance audit is rare. Cross-project co-occurrence analysis reveals that deeper coordination pairs with more explicit context services, stronger execution environments with more structured governance, and formalized tool-registration boundaries with broader ecosystem ambitions. We synthesize five recurring architectural patterns spanning lightweight tools, balanced CLI frameworks, multi-agent orchestrators, enterprise systems, and scenario-verticalized projects. The result provides an evidence-based account of architectural regularities in agent-system engineering, with grounded guidance for framework designers, selectors, and researchers.
title_zh: AI代理框架中的架构设计决策
abstract_zh: 人工智能代理系统日益依赖可复用的非大语言模型（LLM）工程基础设施，这些基础设施整合了工具中介、上下文管理、任务委派、安全控制以及编排等功能。然而，围绕这些基础设施的架构设计决策仍缺乏深入研究。本文通过对70个公开可用的代理系统项目进行协议引导、基于源码的实证研究，探讨三个核心问题：哪些设计决策维度在项目中反复出现？这些决策之间存在怎样的共现关系？典型的架构模式有哪些？方法论上，我们提出了一种透明的分析程序，通过阅读源代码和技术文档来分析异构的代理系统数据集。实证结果表明，存在五个反复出现的设计维度：子代理架构、上下文管理、工具系统、安全机制和编排方式；研究发现，文件持久化、混合式与分层式的上下文策略更受青睐；以注册表为核心的工具系统仍占主导地位，而基于MCP和插件的扩展形式正在兴起；中间隔离较为普遍，但高保障性审计机制却极为罕见。跨项目共现分析揭示：更深层次的协调往往伴随更显式的上下文服务，更强的执行环境则对应更结构化的治理机制，而形式化的工具注册边界通常与更广泛的生态系统愿景相关联。我们归纳出五类典型的架构模式，涵盖轻量级工具、平衡型命令行框架、多代理编排器、企业级系统以及场景垂直化的项目。本研究为代理系统工程中的架构规律提供了基于证据的描述，并为框架设计者、选型者及研究人员提供了具有实践基础的指导建议。

title: Generative Adversarial Network Based Anomaly Detection for Software Defect Prediction
authors: Aradhana Soni, James Ostrowski, Anahita Khojandi
abstract: Predicting software defects effectively is crucial for high-quality software development. Traditionally, defect prediction has relied on supervised techniques, limited by data availability. This paper applies a new Generative Adversarial Network-based technique for detecting anomalies (GAN-AN), tailored to early defect identification in software development. Our technique, which detects defects as anomalies, is compared against three established methods: autoencoder, isolation forest, and one-class support vector machine (OCSVM). Our experimentation, utilizing five datasets from the NASA Promise repository, shows GAN-AN to be superior, with improvements of 7 % in precision-recall area under the curve (PR-AUC) and a significant 20 % in F1 score over previous techniques. Further evaluation using validation datasets reveals that while GAN-AN's overall performance was not uniformly superior, it notably outperformed isolation forest and OCSVM in recall on several datasets. This underscores GAN-AN's potential in specific contexts where recall is critical and highlights the importance of context-specific model selection. Our investigation also reveals that performance metrics vary among models, suggesting that the most effective model may vary depending on the dataset and specific detection goals.
title_zh: 基于生成对抗网络的软件缺陷预测异常检测
abstract_zh: 有效预测软件缺陷对于高质量的软件开发至关重要。传统上，缺陷预测依赖于监督学习技术，但受限于数据可用性。本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络的异常检测方法（GAN-AN），专门用于软件开发早期缺陷的识别。该方法将缺陷视为异常进行检测，并与三种成熟的方法——自编码器、孤立森林和一类支持向量机（OCSVM）进行了对比。通过使用NASA Promise数据仓库中的五个数据集进行实验，结果表明GAN-AN表现更优，在精确率-召回率曲线下面积（PR-AUC）方面提升了7%，F1分数更是显著提高了20%。进一步利用验证数据集进行评估发现，尽管GAN-AN的整体性能并非在所有情况下均占优势，但在多个数据集上其召回率明显优于孤立森林和OCSVM。这凸显了GAN-AN在召回率至关重要的特定场景下的潜力，也强调了根据具体情境选择合适模型的重要性。此外，我们的研究还发现不同模型的性能指标存在差异，表明最有效的模型可能因数据集和具体的检测目标而异。

title: Accelerating Enterprise Application Development Through AI-Enhanced Low-Code Platforms: An Empirical Analysis of Oracle APEX with Generative AI Integration
authors: Mohankrishna Kothapalli, Dharanidhar Vuppu
abstract: Low-code platforms promise faster application delivery, but rigorous empirical evidence remains scarce. We conducted exploratory multi-study experiments with 12 professional developers and 20 business analysts to evaluate Oracle APEX with Select AI integration. Our findings reveal substantial productivity gains: developers completed equivalent functionality significantly faster than with ReactJS (mean speedup <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$37 \times$</tex>, though this ratio reflects both platform abstraction and AI benefits), writing 95 % less code. When we tested Select AI's natural language query capabilities across 1,250 queries, GPT4 achieved 71 % accuracy while Cohere and Oracle's models reached 64 % and 61 % respectively. Security testing with 140 adversarial prompts showed Row-Level Security blocked 96% of attacks. Business analysts with no Structured Query Language (SQL) training completed 78 % of data access tasks successfully using natural language alone. These exploratory results suggest AI-enhanced low-code platforms offer significant potential for enterprise development, warranting larger-scale replication studies.
title_zh: 通过AI增强的低代码平台加速企业应用开发：基于生成式AI集成的Oracle APEX实证分析
abstract_zh: 低代码平台承诺实现更快的应用交付，但严谨的实证证据仍然稀缺。我们对12名专业开发人员和20名业务分析师进行了探索性多研究实验，评估了集成Select AI的Oracle APEX平台的表现。研究结果表明，生产力显著提升：与使用ReactJS相比，开发人员完成同等功能所需时间平均缩短了37倍（该倍数既反映了平台抽象带来的优势，也体现了AI技术的贡献），且代码量减少了95%。在对Select AI自然语言查询功能进行的测试中，针对1,250个查询，GPT-4实现了71%的准确率，而Cohere和Oracle自研模型分别达到64%和61%。在140个对抗性提示的安全测试中，行级安全机制成功阻断了96%的攻击。此外，从未接受过结构化查询语言（SQL）培训的业务分析师仅通过自然语言指令，便成功完成了78%的数据访问任务。这些初步结果表明，集成人工智能的低代码平台在企业级开发中具有巨大潜力，值得开展更大规模的重复性研究以进一步验证。

title: EvoGraphCoder: An Evolutionary Graph-Reasoning Framework for Self-Adaptive Software Engineering
authors: Karthik Ramamurthy, Rahul Kumar Konduru, Nurmyrat Amanmadov
abstract: Modern software evolves rapidly, accumulates architectural debt, and develops cross-module dependencies that complicate reliable maintenance. We present EvoGraphCoder, an evolutionary graph-reasoning framework for self-adaptive software engineering. EvoGraphCoder represents source code, tests, commit history, dependencies, performance signals, and review feedback as a relational software graph. It combines Adaptive Evolutionary Code Reasoning (AECR) with a multi-agent design consisting of the Innovator, Critic, and Historian to generate, evaluate, and refine candidate repairs over multiple cycles rather than emitting a single patch. The framework further introduces EvoGraph Memory for persistent cross-release learning and Self-Reflexive Validation for explainable pre-merge verification. Experiments on repository-level repair benchmarks show that EvoGraphCoder improves patch quality and robustness over strong baselines, while maintaining positive improvement across repeated repair cycles. These results suggest that graph-driven evolutionary reasoning with persistent memory offers a practical path toward reliable and explainable AI-assisted software maintenance.
title_zh: EvoGraphCoder：一种用于自适应软件工程的进化图推理框架
abstract_zh: 现代软件发展迅速，不断积累架构债务，并形成复杂的跨模块依赖关系，给可靠维护带来了挑战。我们提出了 EvoGraphCoder，一种用于自适应软件工程的演化图推理框架。EvoGraphCoder 将源代码、测试用例、提交历史、依赖关系、性能信号以及评审反馈等信息统一表示为一个关联的软件图。该框架结合了 自适应演化代码推理（AECR）与多智能体设计，包含 创新者、批评者 和 历史记录者 三个角色，通过多轮迭代生成、评估并优化候选修复方案，而非仅输出单一补丁。此外，该框架引入了 EvoGraph 记忆，实现跨版本的持久化学习；以及 自我反思验证，支持可解释的合并前验证。在仓库级修复基准上的实验表明，EvoGraphCoder 在修复质量与鲁棒性方面优于多个强基线方法，且在多次修复循环中持续保持正向改进。这些结果表明，基于图的演化推理结合持久记忆机制，为实现可靠且可解释的AI辅助软件维护提供了一条切实可行的路径。

title: FocusFuzz: Towards Efficient and Directed Fuzzing for RTL Processor Designs
authors: He Wang, Ruomin Fang, Jingqian Zhang, Xu Chen, Qizhen Xu, Ruiping Yin, Liwei Chen, Gang Shi
publish: ICASSP 2026 - 2026 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
abstract: As processor architectures evolve with the integration of new functional units, verifying the entire hardware design after each modification becomes increasingly inefficient. Although a significant portion of the modules remains unmodified between iterations, traditional verification methodologies still require re-testing of the entire process, failing to leverage this inherent modularity in hardware development.To address this inefficiency, we propose FocusFuzz, a novel module-directed hardware fuzzing framework tailored for processor verification. FocusFuzz integrates two key components: a Static-Dynamic Module Distance Profiler(SDMD) that identifies modules functionally close to the target, and a Module Feature-Guided Mutation Engine (MFGM) enhanced by a lightweight LSTM model to adapt mutation strategies to module-specific functional characteristics. We evaluated FocusFuzz on open-source RISC-V cores, where at the module level it improves time-to-target- coverage (TTTC) by up to 89× and achieves an average 6.94× speedup over DifuzzRTL, the famous currently available fuzzer.
title_zh: FocusFuzz：面向高效且定向的RTL处理器设计模糊测试
abstract_zh: 随着处理器架构不断演进，新功能单元的集成使得每次修改后对整个硬件设计进行验证变得越来越低效。尽管在迭代过程中大部分模块保持不变，但传统的验证方法仍需重新测试整个系统，未能充分利用硬件开发中固有的模块化特性。为解决这一效率问题，我们提出了 FocusFuzz——一种专为处理器验证设计的新型模块导向硬件模糊测试框架。FocusFuzz 集成了两个关键组件：静态-动态模块距离分析器（SDMD），用于识别与目标功能相近的模块；以及基于轻量级 LSTM 模型增强的模块特征引导变异引擎（MFGM），能够根据模块特有的功能特征自适应调整变异策略。我们在开源 RISC-V 核心上对 FocusFuzz 进行了评估，结果表明，在模块级别，其将到达目标覆盖率的时间（TTTC）提升了最高达 89 倍，并在平均性能上相比当前著名的 DifuzzRTL 模糊测试工具实现了 6.94 倍的加速。

title: CAD-Judge: Toward Efficient Morphological Grading and Verification for Text-to-CAD Generation
authors: Zheyuan Zhou, Jiayi Han, Liang Du, Naiyu Fang, Lemiao Qiu, Shuyou Zhang
publish: ICASSP 2026 - 2026 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
abstract: Computer-Aided Design (CAD) models are widely used across industrial design, simulation, and manufacturing processes. Text-to-CAD systems aim to generate editable, general-purpose CAD models from textual descriptions, significantly reducing the complexity and entry barrier associated with traditional CAD workflows. However, rendering CAD models can be slow, and deploying VLMs to review CAD models can be expensive and may introduce reward hacking that degrades the systems. To address these challenges, we propose CAD-Judge, a novel, verifiable reward system for efficient and effective CAD preference grading and grammatical validation. We adopt the Compiler-as-a-Judge Module (CJM) as a fast, direct reward signal, optimizing model alignment by maximizing generative utility through prospect theory. To further improve the robustness during testing phase, we introduce a simple yet effective agentic CAD generation and adopt the Compiler-as-a-Review Module (CRM), which efficiently verifies the generated CAD models, enabling the system to refine them accordingly. Extensive experiments on challenging CAD datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance while maintaining superior efficiency.
title_zh: CAD-Judge：面向文本到CAD生成的高效形态分级与验证
abstract_zh: 计算机辅助设计（CAD）模型在工业设计、仿真和制造流程中被广泛应用。文本到CAD系统旨在从文本描述生成可编辑的通用CAD模型，显著降低了传统CAD工作流程的复杂性和入门门槛。然而，CAD模型的渲染速度较慢，且部署视觉语言模型（VLM）来评估CAD模型成本高昂，还可能引发奖励欺骗问题，从而降低系统的可靠性。为应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种新型、可验证的奖励机制——CAD-Judge，用于高效且准确地进行CAD偏好评分与语法合法性验证。我们采用“编译器即裁判模块”（Compiler-as-a-Judge Module, CJM），作为快速、直接的奖励信号，通过前景理论优化模型对齐，最大化生成模型的实用性。为进一步提升测试阶段的鲁棒性，我们引入了一种简单而高效的代理式CAD生成方法，并结合“编译器即审查模块”（Compiler-as-a-Review Module, CRM），能够高效验证生成的CAD模型，使系统得以自动修正和完善。在多个具有挑战性的CAD数据集上的大量实验表明，我们的方法在保持卓越效率的同时，达到了当前最先进的性能水平。

title: CorrEctor: An Execute-to-Correct Paradigm for Efficient LLM Secure Inference
authors: Dong Liu, Bingzheng Wang, Yifan Zeng, Minghui Pan, Jiang Zhou, Xiaoyan Gu
publish: ICASSP 2026 - 2026 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
abstract: Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) provide hardware-level isolation that protects sensitive user data during Large Language Model (LLM) inference. However, mainstream CPU-based TEEs lack the capability to perform largescale matrix operations efficiently. To mitigate this, many approaches offload computations to untrusted GPUs via parameter encryption or differential privacy, but these typically introduce substantial communication overhead or accuracy degradation. To achieve efficient LLM inference while protecting user request privacy without compromising accuracy, we propose an execute-to-correct paradigm for efficient LLM secure inference, namely CorrEctor. The core mechanism of CorrEctor involves generating a sequence of candidate tokens from user inputs protected by differential privacy on untrusted GPUs, followed by verification and correction within a TEE. Experimental results on mainstream LLMs show that CorrEctor outperforms CPU-based TEE baselines by 1.36× to 3.55× in inference acceleration.
title_zh: 校正器：一种用于高效大语言模型安全推理的执行-校正范式
abstract_zh: 可信执行环境（TEEs）提供了硬件级别的隔离，能够在大型语言模型（LLM）推理过程中保护敏感的用户数据。然而，主流基于CPU的TEEs缺乏高效执行大规模矩阵运算的能力。为缓解这一问题，许多方法通过参数加密或差分隐私将计算任务卸载到不可信的GPU上，但这些方法通常会引入显著的通信开销或精度下降。为了在不牺牲准确性的前提下实现高效的LLM推理并保护用户请求隐私，我们提出了一种“执行-纠错”范式，即CorrEctor，用于高效安全的LLM推理。CorrEctor的核心机制是在不可信GPU上对经过差分隐私保护的用户输入生成一系列候选token，随后在TEEs内进行验证与修正。在主流LLM上的实验结果表明，CorrEctor相比基于CPU的TEEs基线，在推理加速方面提升了1.36倍至3.55倍。

title: Leveraging Llms for Functional Clustering of Microservices
authors: Santiago Di Sabatto, Guillermo Rodriguez, Claudia Marcos, Santiago Vidal
publish: 2025 IEEE CHILEAN Conference on Electrical, Electronics Engineering, Information and Communication Technologies (CHILECON)
abstract: Microservices architectures often suffer from fragmentation and complexity, making system maintenance, scalability, and evolution increasingly difficult. A key challenge in this context is how to effectively group microservices into coherent functional modules. This paper proposes a novel approach for the functional grouping of microservices using Large Language Models (lLMs) and clustering techniques. Our methodology combines semantic and structural analysis of microservices based on their OpenAPI specifications and was validated using real-world microservice datasets. The results demonstrate that integrating semantic and structural similarities leads to more coherent and manageable groupings. Furthermore, leveraging ChatGPT to generate missing endpoint descriptions significantly improved clustering accuracy, achieving a 60 % higher success rate compared to methods without automatic description generation. Our findings suggest that the proposed approach not only enhances the maintainability and scalability of microservice architectures but also streamlines development and deployment workflows, offering a scalable and efficient solution for service organization.
title_zh: 利用大语言模型进行微服务的功能聚类
abstract_zh: 微服务架构常常面临碎片化和复杂性问题，导致系统维护、可扩展性和演进日益困难。在此背景下，一个关键挑战是如何有效地将微服务划分为逻辑一致的功能模块。本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLMs）与聚类技术的新型微服务功能分组方法。我们的方法结合了基于OpenAPI规范的微服务语义分析与结构分析，并通过真实世界中的微服务数据集进行了验证。实验结果表明，融合语义相似性与结构相似性的方法能够生成更加一致且易于管理的分组。此外，利用ChatGPT自动生成缺失的端点描述，显著提升了聚类准确率，相较于不采用自动描述生成的方法，成功率提高了60%。研究结果表明，该方法不仅增强了微服务架构的可维护性与可扩展性，还优化了开发与部署流程，为服务组织提供了一种可扩展、高效的解决方案。

title: Engineering Management for AI-Driven Software Quality Assurance: Practices, Challenges, and Future Direction
authors: Srinivas Reddy Kosna, Subba Rao Katragadda
abstract: The integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) into software systems has introduced unprecedented complexities and opportunities for quality assurance. This paper explores the evolving landscape of software quality engineering management in the age of AI. It examines the critical challenges and best practices for managing the quality of AI-driven software, from data acquisition to model deployment and maintenance. We present a comprehensive framework that synthesizes established software engineering principles with emerging machine learning (ML) development lifecycles. The paper analyzes key engineering management practices, including automated test generation, defect prediction, and continuous model validation, drawing on case studies and industry research. Furthermore, it discusses the future of AI in quality assurance, highlighting the potential of Large Language Models (LLMs) and knowledge graphs to enable more autonomous and intelligent testing paradigms. This paper aims to provide a valuable resource for engineering managers, QA professionals, and researchers navigating the transition to AI-centric software development.
title_zh: 面向人工智能驱动的软件质量保障的工程管理：实践、挑战与未来方向
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）融入软件系统，为质量保证带来了前所未有的复杂性与机遇。本文探讨了在人工智能时代软件质量工程管理的演变格局，深入分析了从数据获取到模型部署与维护等环节中，管理AI驱动软件质量所面临的重大挑战与最佳实践。我们提出一个综合框架，将传统的软件工程原则与新兴的机器学习（ML）开发生命周期相结合。文章通过案例研究和行业调研，分析了关键的工程管理实践，包括自动化测试生成、缺陷预测以及持续模型验证。此外，本文还展望了人工智能在质量保证中的未来发展方向，重点探讨了大型语言模型（LLMs）和知识图谱在实现更自主、更智能测试范式方面的潜力。本论文旨在为工程管理者、QA专业人员及研究人员在向以AI为核心的软件开发转型过程中提供有价值的参考资源。

title: Development of a Gomoku System Based on 2D Array Modeling and Algorithm Optimization
authors: Wenmin Rui, Shengsheng Liu
publish: 2026 5th International Symposium on Computer Applications and Information Technology (ISCAIT)
abstract: Taking the engineering development of digital games as the core, focusing on key technologies such as two-dimensional array modeling, four-direction scanning optimization algorithm and modular programming, the efficient development path of Gobang system is constructed. Based on Python 3.9 + and Pygame 2.1 + environment, this paper designs a four-stage engineering mode of ' demand analysis-algorithm design-modular implementation-system test ', completes the digital modeling of 15 <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\times 15$</tex> chessboard, clarifies the design of draw decision logic and boundary fault tolerance mechanism, reduces the time complexity of winning algorithm from <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathrm{O} 15 \times 15 \times 4 \times 15$</tex> to <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathrm{O} 7 \times 7 \times 4 \times 5$</tex>, and realizes the development of full-function system. Through 80 sets of development sample control tests (the experimental group adopts the optimized path, and the control group is traditional linear development), the results show that the code reuse rate of the experimental group is increased by 37.2 %, the algorithm execution efficiency is increased by 41.5 %, the functional integrity compliance rate is increased by 28.6 %, the module coupling degree is reduced by <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$65.5 \%(\mathrm{p}<0.001)$</tex>, and the abnormal error rate is reduced from 12.3 % to 3.1 %. The technical solution is suitable for the development of small and medium-sized digital games, and provides a reusable paradigm for the landing of core computer technology in interactive applications.
title_zh: 基于二维数组建模与算法优化的五子棋系统开发
abstract_zh: 以数字游戏的工程化开发为核心，聚焦二维数组建模、四向扫描优化算法及模块化编程等关键技术，构建了五子棋系统的高效开发路径。基于Python 3.9+与Pygame 2.1+开发环境，本文设计了一种“需求分析—算法设计—模块实现—系统测试”四阶段工程模式，完成了15×15棋盘的数字化建模，明确了平局判定逻辑与边界容错机制的设计方案，将胜局判断算法的时间复杂度由原来的O(15×15×4×15)降低至O(7×7×4×5)，实现了全功能系统的成功开发。通过80组开发样本控制实验（实验组采用优化开发路径，对照组为传统线性开发），结果表明：实验组代码复用率提升37.2%，算法执行效率提高41.5%，功能完整性符合率提升28.6%，模块耦合度降低65.5%（p<0.001），异常错误率由12.3%降至3.1%。该技术方案适用于中小型数字游戏的开发，为计算机核心技术在交互式应用中的落地提供了可复用的范式。

title: Governed Agentic AI for Software Platforms: A Reference Architecture for Safe Autonomy at Scale
authors: Sureshkumar Karuppuchamy
abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have accelerated the emergence of agentic AI systems capable of reasoning, planning, and acting across software platforms [1], [9]. While such systems promise significant productivity and operational gains, unconstrained autonomy introduces substantial risks related to safety, reliability, security, regulatory compliance, and organizational trust-particularly in large, distributed enterprise environments [3], [11], [12]. These concerns are further amplified by emerging regulatory frameworks such as the European Union's Digital Services Act [5], which impose stricter requirements on transparency, accountability, and human oversight. This paper introduces a governance control plane for agentic AI systems in software platforms and empirically characterizes the trade-offs between autonomy, safety enforcement, and human oversight. The proposed architecture balances autonomous decision-making with deterministic policy enforcement and structured human control. The proposed architecture decomposes agent behavior into four controlled layers: (1) intent interpretation using LLMs [1], (2) policy-aware planning and decision logic informed by enterprise rules and risk constraints [6]–[8], (3) guarded execution over platform APIs inspired by tool-augmented LLM paradigms [9], [10], and (4) continuous telemetry, auditing, and rollback mechanisms to ensure operational safety and accountability. Central to the architecture is the concept of bounded autonomy, where agents automate routine and low-risk decisions while remaining constrained by declarative policies, approval gates, runtime validation, and execution allow-lists. We demonstrate the applicability of this approach through representative enterprise scenarios, including AI-assisted feature rollout and automated issue triage, building on established software engineering and DevOps principles [2], [4]. Beyond qualitative analysis, we report prototype-based measurements of governance overhead and safety effectiveness, including policy-evaluation latency, invalid-action blocking rates, and changes in human intervention volume across autonomy tiers. We further discuss adversarial robustness considerations such as indirect prompt injection [11], [12], concurrency and state-drift management in long-running agents, and policy conflict resolution in multi-agent settings [13]. Overall, this work contributes a practical, governance-centered blueprint for deploying agentic AI systems with explicitly bounded autonomy, observable decision-making, and enforceable safety controls in large-scale software platforms.
title_zh: 面向软件平台的受控代理型人工智能：实现大规模安全自主的参考架构
abstract_zh:
近年来，大型语言模型（LLMs）的快速发展推动了具备推理、规划与跨软件平台执行能力的智能体式人工智能系统（agentic AI systems）的兴起 [1], [9]。尽管这类系统有望显著提升生产效率和运营能力，但缺乏约束的自主性也带来了安全、可靠性、安全性、合规性以及组织信任等方面的严重风险——尤其在大型分布式企业环境中更为突出 [3], [11], [12]。这些担忧因新兴监管框架（如欧盟《数字服务法》[5]）的出台而进一步加剧，该法案对透明度、责任归属和人工监督提出了更严格的要求。

本文提出了一种面向软件平台中智能体式AI系统的治理控制平面（governance control plane），并基于实证研究刻画了自主性、安全管控与人工监督之间的权衡关系。所提出的架构在自主决策与确定性策略执行、结构化人工控制之间实现了良好平衡。该架构将智能体行为分解为四个受控层级：(1) 利用大语言模型进行意图理解 [1]；(2) 基于企业规则与风险约束的、具有政策意识的规划与决策逻辑 [6]–[8]；(3) 受保护的平台API执行机制，借鉴工具增强型大语言模型范式 [9], [10]；(4) 持续的遥测监控、审计记录与回滚机制，以保障操作安全与可追溯性。

该架构的核心理念是“有限自主性”（bounded autonomy）：即智能体仅自动化处理常规且低风险的决策，同时始终受到声明式策略、审批节点、运行时验证及执行白名单等多重约束。我们通过若干典型的企业应用场景展示了该方法的适用性，包括AI辅助的功能发布流程和自动化的故障分类处理，其设计建立在成熟的软件工程与DevOps实践基础之上 [2], [4]。

除了定性分析外，本文还报告了基于原型系统的量化测量结果，涵盖治理开销与安全有效性指标，如策略评估延迟、无效操作拦截率，以及不同自主级别下人工干预量的变化情况。此外，文章还深入探讨了对抗鲁棒性相关挑战，例如间接提示注入攻击 [11], [12]，长期运行智能体中的并发控制与状态漂移管理问题，以及多智能体环境下政策冲突的解决机制 [13]。

总体而言，本工作提供了一个实用、以治理为中心的蓝图，旨在实现大规模软件平台中智能体式AI系统的部署，其特点包括明确限定的自主范围、可观察的决策过程，以及可强制执行的安全控制措施。

title: Multi-Classifier and Deep Learning Framework for Robust Credit Card Fraud Detection
authors: Swathi D R, Kalaiarasan T, Sanjai C, Vinotheni M S, Mariammal K
publish: 2026 International Conference on Innovative Computing, Intelligent Communication and Smart Electrical Systems (ICSES)
abstract: Credit card fraud remains a major concern in the financial sector, leading to significant financial losses and eroding customer trust. Real-time detection is challenging due to highly imbalanced datasets and constantly changing fraud behaviors. This work presents a unified fraud detection framework that combines supervised learning models such as Random Forest, Stochastic Gradient Descent Classifier, Support Vector Machine and Logistic Regression with unsupervised techniques including Isolation Forest, One-Class Support Vector Machine and Density-Based Spatial Clustering for Applications with Noise to identify both known and previously unseen fraud patterns. Reinforcement learning methods such as Q-Learning and Deep Q-Learning enable adaptive detection strategies that improve over time, while deep learning architectures such as Multilayer Perceptron and Long Short-Term Memory networks capture complex sequential and nonlinear transaction patterns. A key contribution is the extraction and conversion of model parameters into FPGA compatible formats using Vitis High-Level Synthesis, enabling real-time hardware-accelerated inference with significantly reduced latency. Experimental evaluation on benchmark datasets demonstrates superior accuracy, recall, F1-score and ROC-AUC with lower false-positive rates compared to individual models, making the proposed framework scalable, adaptive and effective for real-time credit card fraud detection..
title_zh: 用于鲁棒信用卡欺诈检测的多分类器与深度学习框架
abstract_zh: 信用卡欺诈仍然是金融领域的一大难题，导致巨额财务损失并削弱客户信任。由于数据高度不平衡以及欺诈行为不断演变，实时检测面临巨大挑战。本文提出了一种统一的欺诈检测框架，将监督学习模型（如随机森林、随机梯度下降分类器、支持向量机和逻辑回归）与无监督技术（包括孤立森林、一类支持向量机以及基于密度的空间聚类算法——DBSCAN）相结合，以识别已知及此前未见的欺诈模式。强化学习方法（如Q-Learning和深度Q-Learning）使检测策略能够随时间自适应优化，而深度学习架构（如多层感知机和长短期记忆网络）则能捕捉复杂的序列性与非线性交易特征。本研究的关键贡献在于利用Vitis高层次综合技术，将模型参数提取并转换为适用于FPGA的格式，从而实现低延迟的实时硬件加速推理。在基准数据集上的实验评估表明，该框架在准确率、召回率、F1分数和ROC-AUC方面均优于单一模型，且误报率更低，展现出良好的可扩展性、自适应能力与实际有效性，适用于实时信用卡欺诈检测场景。

title: PHPTrigger: Multi-Engine Assisted Vulnerability Auditing and Verification in PHP Applications
authors: Yayuan Zhang, Zhisheng Yang, Jiangyong Shi, Yongjun Wang, Jianzhe Yang, Xi Xuan, Hao Peng, Zhiyuan Jiang
publish: ICASSP 2026 - 2026 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
abstract: With the widespread adoption of web applications and IoT firmware, PHP vulnerabilities have become a frequent and high-impact attack vector. Existing PHP vulnerability auditing approaches, which mainly rely on rule-based detection or precise causal modeling, often struggle to balance high recall with practical exploitability verification.To address this challenge, we propose PHPTrigger, an intelligent auditing framework that integrates multi-engine analysis with large language model reasoning. Without requiring complete causal modeling of vulnerabilities, PHPTrigger combines inter-procedural semantic reasoning with cross-modal semantic generation to automatically locate vulnerabilities and generate environment-adaptive PoCs.We implemented a prototype of PHPTrigger and systematically evaluated it on 150 vulnerabilities collected from 7 open-source projects. Experimental results show that, compared with the state-of-the-art tool ZIPPER, PHPTrigger improves recall by 46% and precision by 62%. For vulnerability verification, PHPTrigger achieved 100% executable PoC rate on 147 detected vulnerabilities. Moreover, PHPTrigger discovered 46 0-day vulnerabilities, of which 34 were assigned CVE identifiers. These results demonstrate the effectiveness and practical value of our approach in real-world vulnerability auditing and verification.
title_zh: PHPTrigger：多引擎辅助的PHP应用程序漏洞审计与验证
abstract_zh:
随着Web应用和物联网固件的广泛采用，PHP漏洞已成为频繁且影响重大的攻击向量。现有的PHP漏洞审计方法主要依赖于基于规则的检测或精确的因果建模，往往难以在高召回率与实际可利用性验证之间取得平衡。为应对这一挑战，我们提出了PHPTrigger——一种集成多引擎分析与大语言模型推理的智能审计框架。该框架无需完整的漏洞因果建模，通过结合过程间语义推理与跨模态语义生成，能够自动定位漏洞并生成环境自适应的PoC（概念验证代码）。

我们实现了一个PHPTrigger原型，并在7个开源项目中收集的150个漏洞上进行了系统评估。实验结果表明，相较于当前最先进的工具ZIPPER，PHPTrigger的召回率提升了46%，准确率提高了62%。在漏洞验证方面，PHPTrigger对147个检测到的漏洞实现了100%可执行的PoC生成率。此外，PHPTrigger共发现了46个0-day漏洞，其中34个已获得CVE编号。这些结果充分证明了本方法在真实世界漏洞审计与验证中的有效性与实用价值。

title: Individual Risky Action Warning of Wearable Sensors on Personalized Health Profiles via LLM
authors: Yiyin Xie, Yuhan Jing, Haifeng Sun, Qi Qi, Bo He, Chengsen Wang, Jingyu Wang
publish: ICASSP 2026 - 2026 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
abstract: Current action recognition methods for health monitoring are often generic, failing to provide personalized warnings and struggling to scale to complex risky behaviors. This paper introduces a two-stage personalized risky action warning system to overcome these limitations. In the first stage, a Large Language Model (LLM) processes user medical histories to generate a tailored set of risky actions and decomposes complex behaviors, significantly enhancing recognition scalability. The LLM then formats this knowledge into structured guidance. In the second stage, an action recognition model, guided by the LLM’s output, utilizes wearable sensor data for a comprehensive risk assessment across action category, intensity, and temporal patterns. This enables precise, real-time warnings. Tested on real-world data for 10 different physical conditions, our system achieves an early warning F1-score of over 90%.
title_zh: 可穿戴传感器通过大语言模型对个性化健康档案的个体风险行为预警
abstract_zh: 当前的健康监测动作识别方法通常较为通用，难以提供个性化预警，且在应对复杂高风险行为时扩展性不足。本文提出了一种两阶段的个性化高风险动作预警系统，以克服上述局限。第一阶段，利用大语言模型（LLM）处理用户的医疗历史，生成量身定制的高风险动作清单，并对复杂行为进行分解，显著提升了动作识别的可扩展性。随后，LLM将这些知识转化为结构化的指导信息。第二阶段，基于LLM输出的指导，动作识别模型结合可穿戴传感器数据，对动作类别、强度及时间模式进行全面的风险评估，从而实现精准、实时的预警。在涵盖10种不同身体状况的真实世界数据上进行测试，本系统实现了超过90%的早期预警F1分数。

title: Scalable Bayesian Fine-Tuning of LLMs for Multi-Objective Bayesian Optimization
authors: Haotian Xiang, Heng Zhang, Qin Lu
publish: ICASSP 2026 - 2026 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
abstract: As the default choice for surrogate modeling in multi-objective Bayesian optimization (MOBO), Gaussian processes (GPs) struggle with irregular high-dimensional variables and non-stationary spaces. To alleviate these challenges, we adapt the prevailing large language model (LLM) as the surrogate model given its powerful capability in feature extraction based on large-scale pre-training. Specifically, we rely on the Bayesian last layer (BLL) framework with the Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) of the LLM as a common feature extractor across objectives, which is amenable to scalable variational (V) training with tractable posterior inference. The resulting LoRA-VBLL-MO surrogate can not only accommodate computation- and storage-efficient recursive Bayesian updates across fine-tuning steps, but can also be coupled with Thompson sampling-based expected hypervolume improvement for acquisition function design. Experimental results on MO molecular optimization benchmarks demonstrate superior performance over baselines.
title_zh: 用于多目标贝叶斯优化的可扩展贝叶斯微调大语言模型
abstract_zh: 在多目标贝叶斯优化（MOBO）中，高斯过程（GPs）作为默认的代理模型，难以应对不规则的高维变量和非平稳空间。为缓解这些挑战，我们引入当前主流的大语言模型（LLM）作为代理模型，利用其基于大规模预训练的强大特征提取能力。具体而言，我们采用贝叶斯最后层（BLL）框架，并结合LLM的低秩适应（LoRA）技术，将其作为跨多个目标的通用特征提取器，该方法支持可扩展的变分（V）训练，并具备可 tractable 的后验推断能力。由此产生的LoRA-VBLL-MO代理模型不仅能够实现计算与存储高效的递归贝叶斯更新，适用于微调的各个步骤，还可与基于汤普森采样（Thompson sampling）的期望超体积改进（expected hypervolume improvement）相结合，用于获取函数设计。在多目标分子优化基准测试中的实验结果表明，该方法显著优于现有基线方法。

title: KubeNetLLM: An Architectural Framework for Context-Aware Kubernetes Network Configuration Using LLMS and MCP
authors: Sonika Arora, Prashanth Josyula, Ankit Rajput
abstract: As organizations scale their containerized infrastructures, managing Kubernetes network configurations has become increasingly complex, with configuration-related issues accounting for 67% of production outages. This paper introduces KubeNetLLM, a comprehensive architectural framework that automates Kubernetes network configuration generation by leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) enhanced with the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Our approach features a sophisticated four-component architecture with hierarchical validation, successfully generating deployable configurations across our test scenarios. Through extensive experiments on real Kubernetes clusters, we demonstrate that KubeNetLLM reduces configuration time from hours to an average of 10.5 seconds while eliminating configuration errors. The framework processes natural language requirements using locally-deployed LLMs (Ollama with llama3.2:3b), consuming only 2,809 tokens across five experimental scenarios. We present a novel MCP-based architecture designed for context-aware configuration, though our current implementation uses simulated MCP responses. The framework includes comprehensive validation, security analysis, and demonstrates the feasibility of natural language-driven infrastructure automation while establishing architectural patterns for future context-aware systems.
title_zh: KubeNetLLM：一种基于大语言模型与MCP的上下文感知式Kubernetes网络配置架构框架
abstract_zh: 随着组织不断扩展其容器化基础设施，Kubernetes网络配置的管理变得日益复杂，其中配置相关问题导致了67%的生产环境故障。本文提出KubeNetLLM，一种全面的架构框架，通过利用大语言模型（LLM）并结合模型上下文协议（MCP）来自动化生成Kubernetes网络配置。该方法采用先进的四组件架构与分层验证机制，在所有测试场景中成功生成可部署的配置。通过对真实Kubernetes集群进行大量实验，我们证明KubeNetLLM将配置时间从数小时缩短至平均10.5秒，同时彻底消除了配置错误。该框架使用本地部署的大语言模型（Ollama搭配llama3.2:3b）处理自然语言需求，五个实验场景总共仅消耗2,809个token。我们提出了一种基于MCP的新颖架构，旨在实现上下文感知的配置生成，尽管当前实现采用模拟的MCP响应。该框架包含全面的验证与安全分析功能，展示了以自然语言驱动基础设施自动化的可行性，并为未来上下文感知系统建立了可复用的架构模式。

title: Metatoolagent: Towards Generalizable Tool Usage in LLMs Through Meta-Learning
authors: Zheng Fang, Wolfgang Mayer, Zeyu Zhang, Jian Wang, Hong-Yu Zhang, Wanli Li, Zaiwen Feng
publish: ICASSP 2026 - 2026 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
abstract: Tool learning is increasingly important for large language models (LLMs) to effectively coordinate and utilize a diverse set of tools in order to solve complex real-world tasks. By selecting and integrating appropriate tools, LLMs extend their capabilities beyond pure language understanding to perform specialized functions. However, existing methods for tool selection often focus on limited tool sets and struggle to generalize to novel tools encountered in practical deployments. To address these challenges, we introduce a comprehensive dataset spanning 7 domains, containing 155 tools and 9,377 question-answer pairs, which simulates realistic integration scenarios. Additionally, we propose MetaToolAgent (MTA), a meta-learning approach designed to improve cross-tool generalization. Experimental results show that MTA significantly outperforms baseline methods on unseen tools, demonstrating its promise for building flexible and scalable systems that require dynamic tool coordination.
title_zh: 元工具代理：通过元学习实现大语言模型中可泛化的工具使用
abstract_zh: 工具学习对于大型语言模型（LLMs）日益重要，使其能够有效协调并利用多样化的工具，以解决复杂的现实世界任务。通过选择并整合合适的工具，LLMs 的能力已超越单纯的自然语言理解，扩展至执行专业功能。然而，现有的工具选择方法通常局限于有限的工具集合，在面对实际部署中遇到的新工具时，难以实现良好泛化。为应对这些挑战，我们构建了一个涵盖7个领域的综合性数据集，包含155个工具和9,377对问答样本，模拟了真实的工具集成场景。此外，我们提出了 MetaToolAgent（MTA），一种基于元学习的方法，旨在提升跨工具的泛化能力。实验结果表明，MTA在未见过的工具上显著优于基线方法，展现出其在构建需要动态工具协调的灵活、可扩展系统方面的巨大潜力。

title: From Concept to Creation: Harnessing AI for Rapid Innovation and MVP Delivery
authors: Aparna Krishna Penumatcha
publish: 2025 IEEE Women in Engineering (WIE) Forum USA East
abstract: Light speed development and Minimum Viable Product (MVP)-driven innovation have become the focus of modern product and software engineering as organizations seek quicker time-to-market and swift market confirmation. In that regard, artificial intelligence (AI) has become one of the primary facilitators of improving concept-to-creation pipelines through the automated ideation process, requirement engineering, design, development, testing, deployment, and evaluation. The review is a synthesis of recent literature that aims to explore how AI changes the traditional innovation life-cycles to data-driven, adaptive, and continuous processes that help deliver MVP's quickly. The results show that AI can dramatically enhance the pace of development, its cost-efficiency, and its accuracy in decisions, as well as allow accelerated iteration and validation of evidence-based ones. Nonetheless, it is also stated in the review that there are persistent knowledge gaps in the area of explainability, governance, long-term quality, and human-AI collaboration in MVP scenarios. On these gaps, future research recommendations have been put across, such as the creation of integrated AI-based innovation models, standardized assessment tools, and responsible AI implementation. Holistically, the review offers a unified outlook of AI-based rapid innovation and identifies its strategic opportunities in developing sustainable MVP's.
title_zh: 从概念到创造：利用人工智能实现快速创新与最小可行产品（MVP）的交付
abstract_zh: 光速发展与最小可行产品（MVP）驱动的创新已成为现代产品与软件工程的核心，组织纷纷追求更快的上市时间及迅速的市场验证。在此背景下，人工智能（AI）已成为优化从概念到创造全流程的关键推动力，通过自动化创意生成、需求工程、设计、开发、测试、部署和评估等环节，显著提升效率。本文综述了近期相关文献，旨在探讨AI如何将传统的创新生命周期转变为数据驱动、动态适应且持续迭代的过程，从而加速MVP的交付。研究结果表明，AI能够大幅提升开发速度、成本效益以及决策准确性，并实现证据驱动的快速迭代与验证。然而，该综述也指出，在可解释性、治理机制、长期质量保障以及人机协同等方面仍存在持续的知识空白。针对这些不足，未来研究建议包括构建集成化的AI驱动创新模型、开发标准化评估工具，以及推动负责任的AI实施。总体而言，本综述为基于AI的快速创新提供了统一视角，并揭示了其在打造可持续MVP中的战略机遇。

title: Operationalizing Multi-Agent Interoperability via Contract-Driven Model Context Protocols
authors: Aswathnarayan Muthukrishnan Kirubakaran, Vinoth Punniyamoorthy, Adithya Parthasarathy, Akash Kumar Agarwal, Shiva Kumar Reddy Carimireddy, Nachiappan Chockalingam, Akshay Deshpande
abstract: Multi-agent systems powered by large language models are increasingly used to automate complex workflows involving data processing, infrastructure operations, and service orchestration. However, agent-tool interoperability in such systems is often implemented through informal schemas and prompt-embedded conventions, leading to fragile integrations, limited observability, and high recovery costs under interface evolution. This paper presents a contract-driven approach to operationalizing multi-agent interoperability using the Model Context Protocol (MCP). We propose an MCP-mediated architecture that formalizes agent-tool interactions through explicit capability descriptors, schema validation, and semantic version negotiation, while providing structured telemetry and failure isolation. The design decouples agent reasoning from tool integration, enabling independent evolution of agents and tools without breaking compatibility. We evaluate a prototype implementation using representative multi-agent automation workflows across multiple datasets with controlled schema drift. Experimental results demonstrate a <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{7. 4 \%}$</tex> improvement in integration success rate, a 60.6% reduction in mean time to recovery, and a 4.4 times increase in schema mismatch detection precision, with a P95 mediation latency overhead of 18.4 ms. These results show that contract-driven MCP mediation provides a practical and scalable foundation for building reliable, evolvable, and observable multi-agent systems in production environments.
title_zh: 通过合同驱动的模型上下文协议实现多智能体互操作性
abstract_zh: 由大型语言模型驱动的多智能体系统正被越来越多地用于自动化涉及数据处理、基础设施运维和服务编排的复杂工作流。然而，这类系统中的智能体-工具互操作性通常通过非正式的模式和嵌入提示的约定来实现，导致集成脆弱、可观测性差，并在接口演进时产生高昂的恢复成本。本文提出一种基于契约驱动的方法，利用模型上下文协议（Model Context Protocol, MCP）来实现多智能体互操作性的工程化。我们设计了一种MCP中介架构，通过显式的功能描述、模式验证以及语义版本协商，正式化智能体与工具之间的交互，同时提供结构化的遥测数据和故障隔离能力。该设计将智能体的推理过程与工具集成解耦，使得智能体和工具能够独立演进而无需破坏兼容性。我们在多个数据集上，针对典型的多智能体自动化工作流，对原型系统进行了评估，并引入了受控的模式漂移。实验结果表明，集成成功率提升了7.4%，平均恢复时间减少了60.6%，模式不匹配检测精度提高了4.4倍，P95中继延迟开销仅为18.4毫秒。这些结果表明，基于契约的MCP中介机制为构建可信赖、可演化且可观测的多智能体系统提供了实用且可扩展的生产级基础。

title: Can LLMs Find Bugs in Code? An Evaluation from Beginner Errors to Security Vulnerabilities in Python and C++
authors: Akshay Mhatre, Noujoud Nader, Patrick Diehl, Deepti Gupta
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT-4, Claude 3, and LLaMA 4 are increasingly embedded in software/application development, supporting tasks from code generation to debugging. Yet, their real-world effectiveness in detecting diverse software bugs, particularly complex, security-relevant vulnerabilities, remains underexplored. This study presents a systematic, empirical evaluation of these three leading LLMs using a benchmark of foundational programming errors, classic security flaws, and advanced, production-grade bugs in C++ and Python. The dataset integrates real code from SEED Labs, OpenSSL (via the Suresoft GLaDOS database), and PyBugHive, validated through local compilation and testing pipelines. A novel multi-stage, context-aware prompting protocol simulates realistic debugging scenarios, while a graded rubric measures detection accuracy, reasoning depth, and remediation quality. Our results show that all models excel at identifying syntactic and semantic issues in well-scoped code, making them promising for educational use and as first-pass reviewers in automated code auditing. Performance diminishes in scenarios involving complex security vulnerabilities and large-scale production code, with ChatGPT-4 and Claude 3 generally providing more nuanced contextual analyses than LLaMA 4. This highlights both the promise and the present constraints of LLMs in serving as reliable code analysis tools.
title_zh: 大语言模型能否发现代码中的漏洞？对 Python 和 C++ 中从初学者错误到安全漏洞的评估
abstract_zh:
大型语言模型（LLMs）如ChatGPT-4、Claude 3和LLaMA 4正越来越多地被集成到软件与应用开发中，支持从代码生成到调试的各类任务。然而，这些模型在真实场景中检测多样化软件缺陷——尤其是复杂且具有安全风险的漏洞——的实际效果仍缺乏充分研究。本研究对这三款领先的LLM进行了系统性、实证性的评估，采用涵盖基础编程错误、经典安全漏洞以及C++和Python中的高级生产级缺陷的基准数据集。该数据集整合了来自SEED Labs、OpenSSL（通过Suresoft GLaDOS数据库）以及PyBugHive的真实代码，并通过本地编译与测试流程进行验证。研究设计了一种新颖的多阶段、上下文感知提示协议，以模拟真实的调试场景；同时采用分级评分体系，衡量模型在缺陷检测准确性、推理深度及修复质量方面的表现。

研究结果表明，所有模型在识别范围明确的代码中的语法和语义问题方面表现优异，因此在教育用途或作为自动化代码审计的初步审查工具方面具有广阔前景。然而，在涉及复杂安全漏洞和大规模生产代码的场景中，模型性能显著下降。其中，ChatGPT-4与Claude 3相较LLaMA 4展现出更深入的上下文分析能力。这一发现凸显了LLM在作为可靠代码分析工具方面的巨大潜力，同时也揭示了当前存在的局限性。

title: Hybrid Algorithm of Finite State Machine State Assignment for Power Minimization
authors: Tomasz Grzes
publish: 2025 27th International Symposium on Symbolic and Numeric Algorithms for Scientific Computing (SYNASC)
abstract: The presented paper discusses a hybrid algorithm for minimizing the power consumed by the finite state machine (FSM). The proposed algorithm is based on the modification of three algorithms: the sequential algorithm, where code assignment is based on the previous encoding, state splitting, where a state is divided into several states, and using a special model of an FSM, which lead to the reduction of the length of the internal state's code. Modifications to the algorithms include using the second or third best element in the sequential algorithm, splitting the state into more than two new states, and using different lengths for state code. Every modification is tested to see if it leads to a decrease in the power in the FSM. The proposed algorithm executes methods starting from the state splitting, followed by the implementation of the common architectural model, and finally, the sequential method of state encoding. The experimental results show that the proposed method reduces the power consumption compared to NOVA, JEDI, column-based based and original sequential algorithms by at least 16%.
title_zh: 用于降低功耗的有限状态机状态分配混合算法
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了一种用于降低有限状态机（FSM）功耗的混合算法。所提出的算法基于对三种算法的改进：顺序算法（编码分配基于前一次编码）、状态分裂法（将一个状态拆分为多个状态），以及采用一种特殊的FSM模型，从而减少内部状态编码的长度。对这些算法的改进包括：在顺序算法中使用次优或第三优的元素、将状态拆分为两个以上的新状态，以及采用不同长度的状态编码。每项改进均经过测试，以验证其是否能有效降低FSM的功耗。所提出的算法首先执行状态分裂，然后应用通用架构模型，最后实施顺序状态编码方法。实验结果表明，与NOVA、JEDI、基于列的方法以及原始顺序算法相比，该方法至少可降低16%的功耗。

title: A Dual-Path Approach to Optimizing LLMs: Entropy Constraint for Exploitation and Neural Perturbation For Exploration
authors: Dongxiang Zhang, Yiming Li, Erkun Zhang, Fangjiong Chen, Yijia Zhang, Shixun Zhang
publish: ICASSP 2026 - 2026 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
abstract: Optimizing Large Language Models (LLMs) requires managing the fundamental trade-off between knowledge exploitation (precision) and solution space exploration (diversity). This paper introduces a dual-path optimization framework to address this challenge by providing task-specific tuning methods. For tasks demanding high determinism, we propose Entropy-Constrained with Fine-Tuning, which incorporates an entropy regularization term into the loss function to explicitly reduce output uncertainty and strengthen the model’s precise reasoning capabilities. This method improved the accuracy of Llama3.2-1B on the MMLU bench-mark by 11.62%. Conversely, for scenarios requiring extensive exploration, we introduce Stochastic Neural Perturbation, a technique that applies transient perturbations to model weights during inference to stimulate the generation of diverse content. On the GSM8K benchmark, this approach achieved an accuracy of 50.68% on samples where the baseline model failed, significantly outperforming traditional sampling methods. Together, these complementary methods provide a targeted toolkit for optimizing LLMs, enhancing precision for exploitation-focused tasks and fostering novel discovery for exploration-driven applications.
title_zh: 一种优化大语言模型的双路径方法：基于熵约束的利用与神经扰动探索
abstract_zh: 优化大型语言模型（LLMs）需要在知识利用（精度）与解空间探索（多样性）之间权衡这一根本性矛盾。本文提出一种双路径优化框架，通过任务特定的微调方法来应对这一挑战。对于要求高度确定性的任务，我们提出了“熵约束微调”（Entropy-Constrained with Fine-Tuning）方法，该方法在损失函数中引入熵正则项，显式降低输出不确定性，从而强化模型的精确推理能力。该方法使 Llama3.2-1B 在 MMLU 基准测试中的准确率提升了 11.62%。相反，在需要广泛探索的场景中，我们提出了“随机神经扰动”（Stochastic Neural Perturbation）技术，该技术在推理过程中对模型权重施加瞬时扰动，以激发多样化内容的生成。在 GSM8K 基准测试中，该方法在基线模型失败的样本上达到了 50.68% 的准确率，显著优于传统的采样方法。这两种互补的方法共同构成了一套精准的优化工具集，既可提升以知识利用为导向任务的精度，又能促进以探索驱动应用中的创新发现。
